Example_EN: We talked about our weekend plans after lunch.
Example_CN: 午饭后我们聊了周末的计划。
MemoryTip: about 可记成 a + bout：绕着一件事转一圈。

Example_EN: The clock hangs above the classroom door.
Example_CN: 时钟挂在教室门的上方。
MemoryTip: a-bove：把 bove 想成“高处的位置”。

Example_EN: She walked across the quiet street carefully.
Example_CN: 她小心地走过那条安静的街道。
MemoryTip: across = a + cross，像从十字路口穿过去。

Example_EN: Please act quickly if you hear the alarm.
Example_CN: 若听到警报，请迅速行动。
MemoryTip: act 很短，像舞台上一声令下就开始演。

Example_EN: The school plans a new outdoor activity this Friday.
Example_CN: 学校计划本周五开展新的户外活动。
MemoryTip: activity 来自 active：保持活跃就会有活动。

Example_EN: He wants to become a film actor one day.
Example_CN: 他希望有一天成为电影演员。
MemoryTip: actor = act + or，做表演动作的人。

Example_EN: Please add a little sugar to my tea.
Example_CN: 请往我的茶里加点糖。
MemoryTip: add 像往杯子里再倒一点进去。

Example_EN: Please write your home address on this form.
Example_CN: 请在这张表格上填写家庭住址。
MemoryTip: address 可记：寄信一定要写对地址。

Example_EN: Only an adult can buy the cinema tickets tonight.
Example_CN: 今晚只有成年人可以买电影院的票。
MemoryTip: adult 与 child 相对，想到“长大了”。

Example_EN: The little boy is afraid of the dark room.
Example_CN: 小男孩害怕那间黑暗的房间。

Example_EN: We usually play football after school.
Example_CN: 我们通常放学后踢足球。
MemoryTip: after 和 afternoon 同源：午后就是 after noon。

Example_EN: Shall we meet this afternoon at the library?
Example_CN: 我们今天下午在图书馆见面好吗？
MemoryTip: after + noon：中午之后就是下午。

Example_EN: Could you say that again more slowly?
Example_CN: 你能再说一遍、慢一点吗？
MemoryTip: again 像回声，事情又来一遍。

Collocation: at the age of;old age;age group
Example_EN: She started piano lessons at the age of six.
Example_CN: 她六岁开始学钢琴。
MemoryTip: age 很短，记住“几岁”就是 age。

Example_EN: I met her at a party two years ago.
Example_CN: 两年前我在一次聚会上遇见她。

Example_EN: I agree with your idea about the trip.
Example_CN: 我同意你关于这次旅行的想法。
MemoryTip: agree 里有 gree，像 green 一样“谈妥了很顺”。

Example_EN: Let's open the window for some fresh air.
Example_CN: 我们开窗透透新鲜空气吧。
MemoryTip: air 读起来轻飘飘，像空气。

Example_EN: We will meet you at the airport tomorrow morning.
Example_CN: 我们明天早上在机场接你。
MemoryTip: air + port：空中的港口就是机场。

Example_EN: They spent all day cleaning the flat.
Example_CN: 他们花了一整天打扫公寓。
MemoryTip: all 开口很大，像把一切都包进去。

Example_EN: Dinner is almost ready, so please wash your hands.
Example_CN: 晚饭差不多好了，请去洗手。
MemoryTip: almost = all + most：还差一点点就全部。

Example_EN: She prefers to study alone in the quiet room.
Example_CN: 她更喜欢在安静的房间里独自学习。
MemoryTip: alone 与 along 易混：alone 是一个人。

Example_EN: We walked along the river after dinner.
Example_CN: 晚饭后我们沿着河边散步。

Example_EN: I have already finished my homework today.
Example_CN: 我今天已经做完作业了。

Example_EN: She can also speak a little French.
Example_CN: 她也会说一点法语。
MemoryTip: also 放句中，表示“另外还有”。

Example_EN: He always drinks coffee in the morning.
Example_CN: 他早上总是喝咖啡。
MemoryTip: all + ways：所有路上都会发生。

Collocation: bread and butter;and then;come and see
Example_EN: Please buy bread and milk on your way home.
Example_CN: 回家路上请买面包和牛奶。
MemoryTip: and 像连接两节火车车厢。

Example_EN: Don't get angry with him about the mistake.
Example_CN: 别为这个错误对他生气。
MemoryTip: angry 发音里有 ang，像心里拧着。

Example_EN: The children love looking at farm animals.
Example_CN: 孩子们喜欢看农场里的动物。
MemoryTip: animal 可拆成 ani-mal，想到活物。

Example_EN: Could I have another cup of tea, please?
Example_CN: 请再给我一杯茶好吗？

Collocation: answer the phone;give an answer;correct answer
Example_EN: Please answer the phone when it rings.
Example_CN: 电话铃响时请接一下。
MemoryTip: answer 对 question：问完就要答。

Example_EN: Do you have any questions about the lesson?
Example_CN: 关于这节课你有什么问题吗？
MemoryTip: any 在问句里常表“有没有一些”。

Example_EN: Anyone can join the club after school.
Example_CN: 放学后任何人都可以加入这个俱乐部。

Example_EN: Is there anything else you need from the shop?
Example_CN: 你还需要从店里买别的东西吗？

Example_EN: She packed a red apple in her lunch box.
Example_CN: 她在午餐盒里放了一个红苹果。
MemoryTip: apple 很常见，想到苹果手机也容易记。

Example_EN: Her birthday is in early April this year.
Example_CN: 她今年的生日在四月初。
MemoryTip: A-pril：春天四月的 A 开头月份。

Example_EN: There is a new park in our local area.
Example_CN: 我们本地新开了一座公园。

Collocation: left arm;arm in arm;break an arm
Example_EN: He hurt his left arm during the football match.
Example_CN: 他在足球比赛中伤了左臂。
MemoryTip: arm 短，抬起手臂就能感觉到。

Example_EN: We walked around the city for two hours.
Example_CN: 我们在城里转了两个小时。

Example_EN: The train will arrive at the station at noon.
Example_CN: 火车将在中午到达车站。
MemoryTip: arrive 与 leave 相对：到站 vs 离站。

Example_EN: She takes an art class every Wednesday.
Example_CN: 她每周三上美术课。
MemoryTip: art 短而响亮，像画室里的一声。

Example_EN: You can ask the teacher if you need help.
Example_CN: 需要帮助时可以问老师。
MemoryTip: ask 嘴一张就发出请求。

Example_EN: I usually have breakfast at home.
Example_CN: 我通常在家吃早餐。
MemoryTip: at 点状位置：在某一点。

Example_EN: We usually travel in late August.
Example_CN: 我们通常在八月下旬旅行。
MemoryTip: August 像夏天尾巴的月份。

Collocation: my aunt;aunt and uncle;visit my aunt
Example_EN: My aunt lives near the train station.
Example_CN: 我姨妈住在火车站附近。
MemoryTip: aunt 与 uncle 成对记。

Example_EN: The leaves turn brown in autumn.
Example_CN: 秋天树叶变成褐色。
MemoryTip: 英式用 autumn，美式常说 fall。

Example_EN: Please put your books away after class.
Example_CN: 下课后请把书收好。

Example_EN: Their new baby sleeps most of the day.
Example_CN: 他们的新生儿白天大多在睡觉。
MemoryTip: baby 叠音可爱，像哄孩子。

Example_EN: Please come back before it gets dark.
Example_CN: 请在天黑前回来。
MemoryTip: back 既是背，也是往回走。

Example_EN: We cancelled the picnic because of bad weather.
Example_CN: 因为天气不好，我们取消了野餐。
MemoryTip: bad 与 good 成对记。

Example_EN: She put the apples in a plastic bag.
Example_CN: 她把苹果装进塑料袋。
MemoryTip: bag 短促，像把东西装进去。

Example_EN: The children kicked a ball in the park.
Example_CN: 孩子们在公园里踢球。

Example_EN: He eats a banana after morning exercise.
Example_CN: 晨练后他会吃一根香蕉。
MemoryTip: ba-na-na 三个音节，像弯弯的香蕉。

Example_EN: Their school band will play at the festival.
Example_CN: 他们的校乐队将在节日演出。
MemoryTip: band 可记成一群人绑在一起演奏。

Example_EN: I need to go to the bank this afternoon.
Example_CN: 我今天下午需要去银行。

Collocation: have a bath;bath time;run a bath
Example_EN: She likes to have a bath after a long day.
Example_CN: 忙完漫长的一天后她喜欢洗个澡。
MemoryTip: bath 英式常说 have a bath。

Example_EN: The bathroom is at the end of the hall.
Example_CN: 浴室在走廊尽头。

Example_EN: Please be quiet during the exam.
Example_CN: 考试时请保持安静。

Example_EN: We spent the whole day at the sandy beach.
Example_CN: 我们在沙滩上待了一整天。
MemoryTip: beach 有 ea，像海浪的声音。

Example_EN: It is a beautiful day for a long walk.
Example_CN: 今天适合好好散个步，天气真美。

Example_EN: I stayed home because I felt tired.
Example_CN: 我待在家里，因为我觉得累了。

Example_EN: She hopes to become a doctor in future.
Example_CN: 她希望将来成为一名医生。
MemoryTip: be + come：变成某种样子到来。

Collocation: go to bed;in bed;make the bed
Example_EN: Please make the bed before you leave.
Example_CN: 出门前请把床整理好。
MemoryTip: bed 短，晚上就回到 bed。

Example_EN: His bedroom window looks onto the garden.
Example_CN: 他卧室的窗户朝向花园。

Collocation: a glass of beer;cold beer;drink beer
Example_EN: He ordered a cold beer with his meal.
Example_CN: 他点餐时要了一杯冰啤酒。
MemoryTip: beer 双 e，像泡沫升起。

Example_EN: Brush your teeth before you go to bed.
Example_CN: 睡觉前请刷牙。

Example_EN: The film will begin in ten minutes.
Example_CN: 电影十分钟后开始。

Example_EN: The cat is hiding behind the door.
Example_CN: 猫藏在门后面。

Example_EN: I believe that we can finish this today.
Example_CN: 我相信我们今天能完成这件事。
MemoryTip: believe 里有 lie，但意思是相信而非撒谎——注意区分。

Example_EN: Temperatures may fall below zero tonight.
Example_CN: 今晚气温可能降到零度以下。

Example_EN: Please fasten your seat belt before we leave.
Example_CN: 出发前请系好安全带。
MemoryTip: belt 系在腰上，seat belt 系在座位上。

Example_EN: She is my best friend at school.
Example_CN: 她是我学校里最好的朋友。

Example_EN: I feel better after a short rest.
Example_CN: 休息一会儿后我感觉好多了。
MemoryTip: better 是 good 的比较级。

Example_EN: The shop is between the bank and the cafe.
Example_CN: 那家店在银行和咖啡馆之间。

Example_EN: He rides a bicycle to school every day.
Example_CN: 他每天骑自行车上学。

Example_EN: London is a big city with many parks.
Example_CN: 伦敦是一座有很多公园的大城市。

Example_EN: We went for a bike ride by the lake.
Example_CN: 我们沿着湖边骑车兜风。
MemoryTip: bike 是 bicycle 的短说法。

Example_EN: A small bird was singing outside my window.
Example_CN: 一只小鸟在我窗外唱歌。

Example_EN: We baked a cake for her birthday party.
Example_CN: 我们为她的生日聚会烤了蛋糕。

Example_EN: He always drinks black coffee in the morning.
Example_CN: 他早上总是喝黑咖啡。
MemoryTip: black 与 white 成对记颜色。

Example_EN: The blue sky made everyone feel cheerful.
Example_CN: 蓝色的天空让大家心情愉快。
MemoryTip: blue 既是颜色，也可表示情绪低落。

Example_EN: Please check the notice board for new messages.
Example_CN: 请查看布告栏上的新通知。
MemoryTip: board 可记：公告贴在 board 上。

Example_EN: We took a small boat across the lake.
Example_CN: 我们坐小船穿过湖面。
MemoryTip: boat 短，比 ship 小一号。

Example_EN: Exercise helps keep your body strong and healthy.
Example_CN: 锻炼有助于保持身体健康强壮。

Example_EN: I need to book a table for Friday evening.
Example_CN: 我需要预订周五晚上的餐位。
MemoryTip: book 既是书，也可“订下来”。

Example_EN: The children got bored during the long meeting.
Example_CN: 孩子们在漫长的会议中感到无聊。
MemoryTip: bored 是人的感受；boring 是事物本身。

Example_EN: That film was so boring that I left early.
Example_CN: 那部电影太无聊了，我提前离开了。
MemoryTip: -ing 形容事物让人觉得无聊。

Example_EN: She was born in a small town near York.
Example_CN: 她出生在约克附近的一座小镇。

Example_EN: Both of my brothers live in Manchester.
Example_CN: 我的两个哥哥都住在曼彻斯特。
MemoryTip: both 管两个，neither 一个也不。

Collocation: bottle of water;plastic bottle;open a bottle
Example_EN: Please bring a bottle of water to the gym.
Example_CN: 请带一瓶水去健身房。
MemoryTip: bottle 中间双 t，像瓶颈收紧。

Example_EN: Your keys are at the bottom of the bag.
Example_CN: 你的钥匙在包的底部。

Example_EN: She put the toys back into the cardboard box.
Example_CN: 她把玩具放回纸箱里。

Example_EN: The little boy waved to his mother.
Example_CN: 小男孩向妈妈挥手。

Example_EN: She introduced her boyfriend to her parents.
Example_CN: 她把男朋友介绍给父母。
MemoryTip: boy + friend：男性朋友中的那一位。

Collocation: fresh bread;slice of bread;bread and butter
Example_EN: She bought fresh bread from the corner shop.
Example_CN: 她在街角小店买了新鲜面包。
MemoryTip: bread 是餐桌上的基本主食。

Collocation: take a break;break a glass;coffee break
Example_EN: Let's take a short break after this chapter.
Example_CN: 学完这一章后我们休息一会儿吧。
MemoryTip: break 既可打破，也可“打断一下休息”。

Example_EN: We usually have breakfast at half past seven.
Example_CN: 我们通常七点半吃早餐。
MemoryTip: break + fast：打断禁食，开始吃早饭。

Example_EN: Please bring your notebook to tomorrow's class.
Example_CN: 请带笔记本参加明天的课。
MemoryTip: bring 朝说话人方向拿来；take 拿去。

Example_EN: My older brother works in a bookshop.
Example_CN: 我哥哥在书店工作。
MemoryTip: brother 与 sister 成对记家人。

Example_EN: She has dark brown hair and brown eyes.
Example_CN: 她有深棕色的头发和棕色的眼睛。
MemoryTip: brown 像泥土和树干的颜色。

Example_EN: They plan to build a new house next year.
Example_CN: 他们计划明年建一座新房子。

Example_EN: She has a very busy day at the office.
Example_CN: 她今天在办公室非常忙碌。
MemoryTip: busy 音似“逼急”，事情把人逼得很急。

Example_EN: I like tea but I prefer coffee today.
Example_CN: 我喜欢茶，但今天更想喝咖啡。
MemoryTip: but 一转折，前后意思拧一下。

Example_EN: Please pass the butter for my toast.
Example_CN: 请把黄油递给我抹吐司。
MemoryTip: butter 软软的，涂在面包上。

Example_EN: We need to buy tickets before the show.
Example_CN: 演出前我们需要买票。
MemoryTip: buy 与 by 同音不同义，付钱才是 buy。

Example_EN: She goes to work by bus every morning.
Example_CN: 她每天早上坐公交上班。
MemoryTip: by 表方式：by bus 靠公交完成。

Example_EN: We met at a small cafe near the station.
Example_CN: 我们在车站附近的一家小咖啡馆见面。
MemoryTip: cafe 来自法语，想成喝咖啡的小店。

Example_EN: Mum baked a chocolate cake for dessert.
Example_CN: 妈妈烤了巧克力蛋糕当甜点。
MemoryTip: piece of cake 也表示“小菜一碟”。

Collocation: call a friend;give a call;call back
Example_EN: I will call you after the meeting ends.
Example_CN: 会议结束后我会给你打电话。
MemoryTip: call 张口一喊，或拿起电话。

Example_EN: He packed a digital camera for the trip.
Example_CN: 他为旅行带了一台数码相机。
MemoryTip: camera 抓拍画面，像捕捉瞬间。

Example_EN: The children loved summer camp last year.
Example_CN: 孩子们去年很喜欢夏令营。
MemoryTip: camp 帐篷一扎就是营地。

Example_EN: She can swim quite well for her age.
Example_CN: 以她的年龄来说，她游泳已经很好了。
MemoryTip: can 能力或罐头，看语境。

Example_EN: Paris is the capital of France.
Example_CN: 巴黎是法国的首都。
MemoryTip: capital 既是首都，也是大写字母。

Example_EN: They drove a car to the countryside.
Example_CN: 他们开车去了乡下。

Example_EN: Please bring your ID card to the exam.
Example_CN: 请带身份证参加考试。
MemoryTip: card 一张薄片，信息写在上面。

Example_EN: Please read the instructions carefully first.
Example_CN: 请先仔细阅读说明。

Example_EN: She added a fresh carrot to the soup.
Example_CN: 她往汤里加了一根新鲜胡萝卜。
MemoryTip: carrot 橙黄，像奖励的“萝卜”。

Example_EN: Can you help me carry this heavy bag?
Example_CN: 你能帮我提这个重袋子吗？

Example_EN: The kids watch a cartoon every Sunday morning.
Example_CN: 孩子们每周日早上都看卡通片。
MemoryTip: cartoon 夸张线条，想到动画。

Example_EN: In this case we should wait a little longer.
Example_CN: 这种情况下我们应该再等一会儿。
MemoryTip: case 盒子装东西，也指情形。

Example_EN: Do you prefer to pay cash or by card?
Example_CN: 你更想付现金还是刷卡？

Example_EN: Their black cat sleeps on the sofa.
Example_CN: 他们的黑猫睡在沙发上。
MemoryTip: cat 短，和 dog 成对记宠物。

Collocation: catch a ball;catch a bus;catch a cold
Example_EN: Hurry or you will miss and catch the later bus.
Example_CN: 快点，否则只能赶下一班车了。
MemoryTip: catch 手一合把东西捉住。

Example_EN: The museum is in the city centre.
Example_CN: 博物馆位于市中心。

Example_EN: Online learning grew fast in this century.
Example_CN: 本世纪在线学习发展很快。

Example_EN: I will certainly help you with the project.
Example_CN: 我当然会帮你做这个项目。
MemoryTip: certain + ly：把确定说得更肯定。

Collocation: sit on a chair;office chair;chair leg
Example_EN: Please take a chair near the window.
Example_CN: 请坐靠窗的那把椅子。

Example_EN: I met my old teacher by chance downtown.
Example_CN: 我在市中心偶然遇见了以前的老师。

Example_EN: You should change your wet clothes soon.
Example_CN: 你应该尽快换下湿衣服。
MemoryTip: change 既是变化，也指零钱。

Example_EN: We found a cheap hotel near the station.
Example_CN: 我们在车站附近找到一家便宜旅馆。

Example_EN: He put cheese on his warm sandwich.
Example_CN: 他在热三明治上放了奶酪。
MemoryTip: cheese 拍照喊声也常说 Cheese。

Example_EN: Mum cooked roast chicken for Sunday lunch.
Example_CN: 妈妈周日午饭做了烤鸡。
MemoryTip: chicken 可指活鸡也可指鸡肉。

Example_EN: Every child needs time to play outside.
Example_CN: 每个孩子都需要到户外玩耍的时间。
MemoryTip: child 复数是 children，不规则。

Example_EN: She bought a dark chocolate bar after work.
Example_CN: 下班后她买了一块黑巧克力。

Example_EN: You can choose between tea and coffee.
Example_CN: 你可以在茶和咖啡之间选择。

Collocation: go to the cinema;cinema ticket;local cinema
Example_EN: Shall we go to the cinema this evening?
Example_CN: 我们今晚去电影院好吗？
MemoryTip: cinema 英式常说，美式多说 movies。

Example_EN: She moved to a bigger city for university.
Example_CN: 她为上大学搬去了更大的城市。
MemoryTip: city 比 town 更大更繁华。

Example_EN: Our English class starts at nine o'clock.
Example_CN: 我们的英语课九点开始。

Example_EN: Please keep the classroom tidy after lessons.
Example_CN: 请在下课后保持教室整洁。

Example_EN: Please clean your room before guests arrive.
Example_CN: 客人来之前请把房间打扫干净。
MemoryTip: clean 反义词 dirty，成对记。

Example_EN: That was a clever idea for saving time.
Example_CN: 那真是个节省时间的聪明主意。

Example_EN: They climbed a small hill behind the village.
Example_CN: 他们爬上了村子后面的小山。
MemoryTip: climb b 不发音，像悄悄往上爬。

Example_EN: The alarm clock woke me at six.
Example_CN: 闹钟在六点把我叫醒。

Example_EN: Please close the door when you leave.
Example_CN: 离开时请把门关上。

Example_EN: Pack some warm clothes for the mountain trip.
Example_CN: 去山区记得带些保暖衣服。

Example_EN: Dark clouds covered the sky before rain.
Example_CN: 下雨前乌云遮住了天空。
MemoryTip: cloud 既是天上的云，也有云存储。

Example_EN: He joined a sports club last month.
Example_CN: 他上个月加入了一家运动俱乐部。
MemoryTip: club 一群人聚在一起活动。

Collocation: winter coat;put on a coat;coat pocket
Example_EN: Put on a warm coat before you go out.
Example_CN: 出门前穿上暖和的外套。

Example_EN: I usually drink black coffee in the morning.
Example_CN: 我早上通常喝黑咖啡。

Example_EN: Wear a scarf in this cold weather.
Example_CN: 这么冷的天请戴围巾。

Example_EN: She hopes to go to art college next year.

Collocation: at the gym;school gym;go to the gym

Example_CN: 我每周去三次健身房。
MemoryTip: gym 是 gymnasium 的缩写。

Example_EN: Reading before bed is a good habit for me.
Example_CN: 睡前阅读对我来说是个好习惯。

Example_EN: She has long brown hair and brown eyes.
Example_CN: 她有棕色长发和棕色眼睛。
MemoryTip: hair：头上的毛发（整体常作不可数）。

Example_EN: The film starts in half an hour from now.
Example_CN: 电影半小时后开始。

Example_EN: The concert will be held in the school hall.
Example_CN: 音乐会将在学校礼堂举行。

Example_EN: Please raise your hand if you know the answer.
Example_CN: 如果知道答案请举手。
MemoryTip: hand：手上的那只手，也可递交。

Example_EN: What happened to your phone yesterday evening?
Example_CN: 你手机昨天晚上去哪儿了？

Example_EN: The children look happy in the new playground.
Example_CN: 孩子们在新操场上显得很开心。

Example_EN: She works hard to improve her English every day.
Example_CN: 她每天努力提高英语。

Collocation: put on a hat;sun hat;hat shop
Example_EN: Wear a hat if you sit in the sun long.
Example_CN: 如果在太阳下坐很久，请戴帽子。

Example_EN: I hate getting up early on cold winter mornings.
Example_CN: 我讨厌在寒冷冬日早起。

Example_EN: We usually have breakfast at seven o'clock.
Example_CN: 我们通常七点吃早饭。

Example_EN: He wants to study art at university next year.
Example_CN: 他明年想在大学学艺术。

Example_EN: She shook her head and said nothing more.
Example_CN: 她摇了摇头，没再说什么。
MemoryTip: head：身体最上端，也指负责人。

Example_EN: I stayed home because of a bad headache.
Example_CN: 我因为严重头痛待在家里。

Example_EN: Exercise is important for your health every day.
Example_CN: 每天锻炼对你的健康很重要。
MemoryTip: health：身体与精神的良好状态。

Example_EN: Fruit and vegetables help you stay healthy.
Example_CN: 水果和蔬菜帮你保持健康。

Example_EN: Did you hear about the school sports day?
Example_CN: 你听说学校运动会的事了吗？
MemoryTip: hear：声音进入耳朵；listen 是有意去听。

Example_EN: I learned this poem by heart last week.
Example_CN: 我上周把这首诗背下来了。

Example_EN: Please heat up the soup before you eat it.
Example_CN: 喝汤前请先加热。

Example_EN: This bag is too heavy for me to carry.
Example_CN: 这个包太重我拿不动。

Example_EN: What is the height of this mountain, please?
Example_CN: 请问这座山有多高？

Example_EN: She said hello to her new neighbours kindly.
Example_CN: 她友好地跟新邻居打了招呼。

Example_EN: Can you help me with this heavy box?
Example_CN: 你能帮我搬这个重箱子吗？

Example_EN: This is her favourite song of all time.
Example_CN: 这是她有史以来最喜欢的歌。

Example_EN: Please come here and look at this picture.
Example_CN: 请过来看这张图片。

Example_EN: That blue umbrella by the door is hers.
Example_CN: 门边那把蓝伞是她的。
MemoryTip: hers：名词性物主代词，后不接名词。

Example_EN: She finished the project by herself yesterday.
Example_CN: 她昨天自己完成了这个项目。

Example_EN: Hey, wait for me at the bus stop!
Example_CN: 嘿，在公交车站等我！

Example_EN: Hi, my name is Anna and I am new here.
Example_CN: 嗨，我叫安娜，我是新来的。
MemoryTip: hi：比 hello 更随意的招呼。

Example_EN: She got a high score on the English test.
Example_CN: 她英语考试得了高分。

Collocation: up the hill;green hill;over the hill
Example_EN: We walked up the hill to see the view.
Example_CN: 我们走上小山去看风景。

Example_EN: Please give him this message after class.
Example_CN: 请在课后把这个口信给他。

Example_EN: He taught himself English by watching films.
Example_CN: 他通过看电影自学英语。

Example_EN: This is his seat, please do not take it.
Example_CN: 这是他的座位，请不要坐。

Example_EN: We learned about ancient Rome in history class.
Example_CN: 我们在历史课上学习了古罗马。

Collocation: favourite hobby;hobby of;take up a hobby
Example_EN: Reading is my favourite hobby after school.
Example_CN: 阅读是我放学后最喜欢的爱好。

Example_EN: We went on holiday to Spain last August.
Example_CN: 去年八月我们去西班牙度假了。
MemoryTip: 英式 holiday；美式常说 vacation。

Example_EN: I usually do my homework at home after school.
Example_CN: 我通常放学后在家写作业。

Example_EN: Have you finished your homework for tomorrow?
Example_CN: 明天的作业你做完了吗？

Example_EN: Please be honest about what really happened.
Example_CN: 请诚实地说明到底发生了什么。
MemoryTip: honest：说真话、不撒谎；h 不发音。

Example_EN: I hope to visit Japan next summer holiday.
Example_CN: 我希望明年暑假去日本。

Example_EN: She learned to ride a horse last summer.
Example_CN: 她去年夏天学会了骑马。

Example_EN: He stayed in hospital for two days last week.
Example_CN: 他上周住院两天。
MemoryTip: 英式 in hospital（不加 the）常指住院。

Example_EN: It was too hot to play outside at noon.
Example_CN: 正午太热，没法在外面玩。

Collocation: hotel room;book a hotel;at the hotel
Example_EN: We booked a hotel near the railway station.
Example_CN: 我们在火车站附近订了酒店。

Example_EN: The meeting will last about one hour today.
Example_CN: 今天会议大约持续一小时。

Example_EN: They bought a new house near the river.
Example_CN: 他们在河边买了一栋新房子。
MemoryTip: house：建筑物本身；home 更重“家”的感觉。

Example_EN: How do you usually go to school each day?
Example_CN: 你每天通常怎么去学校？

Example_EN: I was tired; however, I finished my homework.
Example_CN: 我很累；然而我还是完成了作业。

Example_EN: There are about two hundred books on this shelf.
Example_CN: 这个架子上大约有两百本书。

Example_EN: I feel hungry after playing football outside.
Example_CN: 在外面踢完足球后我感到饿了。

Collocation: her husband;husband and wife;become a husband
Example_EN: Her husband works at the city hospital.
Example_CN: 她丈夫在市医院工作。

Example_EN: I am learning English because I like films.
Example_CN: 我学英语是因为我喜欢电影。
MemoryTip: I：说话者自己；写作须大写。

Example_EN: Would you like some ice in your drink?
Example_CN: 你饮料里要加冰吗？

Example_EN: That sounds like a good idea for the weekend.
Example_CN: 那听起来是个不错的周末主意。

Example_EN: If it rains tomorrow, we will stay at home.
Example_CN: 如果明天下雨，我们就待在家里。

Example_EN: She stayed in bed because she felt ill.
Example_CN: 她因为感到不适而躺在床上。

Example_EN: The website shows an image of the hotel room.
Example_CN: 网站上显示了酒店房间的图片。

Collocation: use your imagination;imagine that;hard to imagine
Example_EN: I cannot imagine life without music now.
Example_CN: 我现在无法想象没有音乐的生活。

Example_EN: It is important to drink enough water every day.
Example_CN: 每天喝足够的水很重要。

Example_EN: Her English has improved a lot this term.
Example_CN: 她这学期英语进步了很多。
MemoryTip: im + prove：证明自己变得更好。

Example_EN: Please put your bag in the corner by the door.
Example_CN: 请把包放在门边的角落里。

Example_EN: The price includes breakfast and free wifi.
Example_CN: 价格包括早餐和免费无线网。

Example_EN: Everyone is coming, including my little brother.
Example_CN: 每个人都会来，包括我弟弟。
MemoryTip: including = include 的 -ing 形式，表“包括”。

Example_EN: House prices increased a lot last year.
Example_CN: 去年房价上涨了很多。

Example_EN: The film was very good indeed, I watched twice.
Example_CN: 这部电影确实很好，我看了两遍。

Example_EN: Please give me more information about the course.
Example_CN: 请给我更多关于这门课的信息。
MemoryTip: in + form + ation：把事实组织成信息。

Collocation: inside the box;go inside;on the inside
Example_EN: It is warm inside the house this evening.
Example_CN: 今晚屋子里面很暖和。

Example_EN: I drank tea instead of coffee this morning.
Example_CN: 我今早喝茶代替了咖啡。

Example_EN: She takes a strong interest in local history.
Example_CN: 她对当地历史很感兴趣。

Example_EN: I am interested in learning Japanese next year.
Example_CN: 我对明年学日语感兴趣。
MemoryTip: interested：人对事物感兴趣；interesting 是事物本身有趣。

Example_EN: That documentary looks interesting for our class.
Example_CN: 那部纪录片对我们班来说看起来很有趣。

Example_EN: I found the answer on the internet yesterday.
Example_CN: 我昨天在互联网上找到了答案。

Example_EN: She walked into the library with a big smile.
Example_CN: 她面带微笑走进了图书馆。

Example_EN: Let me introduce my friend to you now.
Example_CN: 让我现在把朋友介绍给你。

Collocation: invent a machine;invent a story;newly invented
Example_EN: Who invented the telephone many years ago?
Example_CN: 多年前是谁发明了电话？

Example_EN: Did you invite her to your birthday party?
Example_CN: 你邀请她参加你的生日派对了吗？

Example_EN: We spent a week on a quiet island last summer.
Example_CN: 去年夏天我们在安静的岛上待了一周。
MemoryTip: is + land：水中间的陆地；i 不发音。

Example_EN: It is raining hard outside this afternoon.
Example_CN: 今天下午外面雨下得很大。
MemoryTip: it：指物、天气、时间等中性代词。

Example_EN: The dog wagged its tail when I arrived.
Example_CN: 我到时那只狗摇着它的尾巴。

Example_EN: The door closed by itself during the night.
Example_CN: 夜里门自己关上了。

Collocation: leather jacket;put on a jacket;winter jacket
Example_EN: He put on a warm jacket before going out.
Example_CN: 他出门前穿上了暖和的夹克。

Example_EN: We were stuck in a traffic jam for one hour.
Example_CN: 我们堵在交通堵塞里一个小时。

Example_EN: School starts again in early January here.
Example_CN: 这里学校在一月初重新开学。
MemoryTip: January：一年的第一个月，来自 Janus。

Collocation: blue jeans;a pair of jeans;wear jeans
Example_EN: She usually wears blue jeans at the weekend.
Example_CN: 她周末通常穿蓝色牛仔裤。

Collocation: find a job;part-time job;do a job
Example_EN: He found a part-time job near the university.
Example_CN: 他在大学附近找到一份兼职工作。

Collocation: join a club;join in;join the team
Example_EN: Would you like to join our football team?
Example_CN: 你想加入我们的足球队吗？
MemoryTip: join：接到一起 / 加入组织。

Collocation: tell a joke;make a joke;practical joke
Example_EN: He told a funny joke and everyone laughed.
Example_CN: 他讲了个好笑的笑话，大家都笑了。

Example_EN: The train journey to Edinburgh took four hours.
Example_CN: 去爱丁堡的火车旅程花了四小时。

Example_EN: I drink a glass of orange juice every morning.
Example_CN: 我每天早上喝一杯橙汁。

Example_EN: Our summer holiday usually begins in July.
Example_CN: 我们暑假通常从七月开始。

Example_EN: The children love to jump into the swimming pool.
Example_CN: 孩子们喜欢跳进游泳池。

Example_EN: The wedding will take place in mid-June.
Example_CN: 婚礼将在六月中举行。

Example_EN: I have just finished my homework this minute.
Example_CN: 我刚刚这一分钟才做完作业。
MemoryTip: just：刚刚 / 仅仅 / 公正。

Example_EN: Please keep the window closed at night.
Example_CN: 请晚上把窗户关着。
MemoryTip: keep：继续持有或使保持某状态。

Example_EN: Have you seen the key to the front door?
Example_CN: 你看见前门的钥匙了吗？

Example_EN: I need a new keyboard for my laptop.
Example_CN: 我的笔记本电脑需要一个新键盘。

Example_EN: Please do not kick the ball in the classroom.
Example_CN: 请不要在教室里踢球。

Example_EN: The little kids are playing in the garden.
Example_CN: 小孩子们在花园里玩。
MemoryTip: kid：小孩；口语 just kidding = 开玩笑。

Example_EN: Mosquitoes can kill animals in some hot places.
Example_CN: 在某些炎热地区，蚊子能杀死动物。

Example_EN: The school is three kilometres from my house.
Example_CN: 学校离我家三公里。

Example_EN: She is always kind to new students at school.
Example_CN: 她在学校对新生总是很友善。

Example_EN: The old story is about a kind young king.
Example_CN: 这个老故事讲的是一位善良的年轻国王。
MemoryTip: king 与 queen 成对记。

Example_EN: She gave her mother a kiss before school.
Example_CN: 上学前她亲了妈妈一下。

Example_EN: Mum is cooking dinner in the kitchen now.
Example_CN: 妈妈现在在厨房做晚饭。

Collocation: on your knees;hurt your knee;knee pain
Example_EN: He fell and hurt his left knee badly.
Example_CN: 他摔倒了，左膝盖伤得很重。
MemoryTip: knee：腿中间弯折处；k 不发音。

Example_EN: Please be careful with that sharp kitchen knife.
Example_CN: 请小心那把锋利的厨房刀。
MemoryTip: knife：切东西的刀具；k 不发音。

Example_EN: Do you know how to open this computer file?
Example_CN: 你知道怎么打开这个电脑文件吗？

Collocation: by the lake;lake view;across the lake
Example_EN: We walked around the lake after Sunday lunch.
Example_CN: 周日午饭后我们绕着湖散步。
MemoryTip: lake：比 pond 更大的淡水湖。

Collocation: desk lamp;turn on the lamp;bedside lamp
Example_EN: Please turn on the desk lamp for reading.
Example_CN: 请打开台灯来阅读。

Example_EN: English is a useful language for travel abroad.
Example_CN: 英语是出国旅行的有用语言。

Example_EN: They live in a large flat near the park.
Example_CN: 他们住在公园附近一套大公寓里。

Example_EN: I saw her at the cinema last Saturday night.
Example_CN: 上周六晚上我在电影院看见她。

Example_EN: Sorry I am late for the meeting today.
Example_CN: 抱歉我今天开会迟到了。

Collocation: see you later;later that day;much later
Example_EN: I will call you later this evening, OK?
Example_CN: 我今晚晚些时候给你打电话，好吗？
MemoryTip: later = late 的比较级，表“之后”。

Example_EN: The joke made the whole class laugh loudly.
Example_CN: 这个笑话让全班大声笑了起来。

Example_EN: You must not break the law in any country.
Example_CN: 在任何国家你都不能违法。

Collocation: become a lawyer;family lawyer;see a lawyer
Example_EN: She hopes to become a lawyer after university.
Example_CN: 她希望大学毕业后成为律师。

Example_EN: Do not be lazy about cleaning your room.
Example_CN: 打扫房间别偷懒。

Example_EN: Children learn new words very quickly at school.
Example_CN: 孩子们在学校学新词很快。

Example_EN: You should sleep at least eight hours tonight.
Example_CN: 你今晚至少应该睡八个小时。

Example_EN: We will leave for the airport at six.
Example_CN: 我们六点出发去机场。

Example_EN: Turn left at the next traffic lights, please.
Example_CN: 请在下一个红绿灯左转。
MemoryTip: left：左边，也是 leave 的过去式。

Example_EN: He hurt his leg while playing football yesterday.
Example_CN: 他昨天踢足球时伤到了腿。

Example_EN: I like a slice of lemon in my tea.
Example_CN: 我喜欢在茶里放一片柠檬。

Example_EN: Can you lend me your pen for a minute?
Example_CN: 能把笔借我用一分钟吗？

Example_EN: I spent less money this month than last month.
Example_CN: 我这个月花钱比上个月少。

Example_EN: Our next English lesson starts at ten.
Example_CN: 我们下一节英语课十点开始。

Example_EN: Please let me help you with those bags.
Example_CN: 请让我帮你拿那些包。

Example_EN: I wrote a letter to my grandma yesterday.
Example_CN: 我昨天给奶奶写了一封信。

Example_EN: His English is at a high level now.
Example_CN: 他的英语现在已达到很高水平。

Example_EN: I borrowed three books from the public library.
Example_CN: 我从公共图书馆借了三本书。
MemoryTip: libr- 与书有关：藏书之地。

Example_EN: Please lie down and rest for a few minutes.
Example_CN: 请躺下休息几分钟。
MemoryTip: lie：躺下，或说谎（词形相同意不同）。

Example_EN: Exercise is an important part of daily life.
Example_CN: 锻炼是日常生活的重要部分。

Collocation: lift up;give a lift;take the lift
Example_EN: Can you help me lift this heavy box?
Example_CN: 你能帮我抬起这个重箱子吗？

Collocation: turn on the light;traffic light;light blue
Example_EN: Please turn on the light; it is too dark.
Example_CN: 请开灯，太暗了。

Example_EN: I like to read before I go to bed.
Example_CN: 我喜欢在睡觉前阅读。

Example_EN: Please wait in line for the bus tickets.
Example_CN: 请排队买公交车票。

Example_EN: The children watched a lion at the zoo.
Example_CN: 孩子们在动物园看了一头狮子。
MemoryTip: lion：草原上的大型猫科动物。

Example_EN: I wrote a shopping list before I left home.
Example_CN: 出门前我写了一份购物清单。

Example_EN: Please listen carefully to the teacher's question.
Example_CN: 请仔细听老师的问题。

Example_EN: There is a little milk left in the fridge.
Example_CN: 冰箱里还剩一点牛奶。

Example_EN: They live in a small town near the sea.
Example_CN: 他们住在海边一座小镇。
MemoryTip: live /lɪv/ 居住；/laɪv/ 现场直播。

Example_EN: We buy bread from the local shop each day.
Example_CN: 我们每天在当地小店买面包。

Example_EN: It has been a long time since we met.
Example_CN: 我们很久没见面了。

Example_EN: Please look at the board and copy the words.
Example_CN: 请看黑板并抄下单词。

Collocation: lose weight;lose a game;lose your way
Example_EN: Do not lose your ticket on the way home.
Example_CN: 回家路上别把票弄丢了。

Collocation: a lot of;lots of;thanks a lot
Example_EN: There are a lot of books on that shelf.
Example_CN: 那个架子上有许多书。

Example_EN: Please do not play loud music after ten.
Example_CN: 十点后请不要大声放音乐。

Example_EN: I love to walk by the river after dinner.
Example_CN: 我喜欢晚饭后沿河散步。

Example_EN: We had a lovely day at the beach yesterday.
Example_CN: 昨天我们在海滩度过了美好的一天。

Example_EN: They bought the table at a very low price.
Example_CN: 他们以很低的价格买下了那张桌子。

Example_EN: Good luck with your English test tomorrow!
Example_CN: 祝你明天英语考试好运！

Example_EN: She felt lucky to find an empty seat.
Example_CN: 她庆幸找到了一个空座位。

Example_EN: Shall we have lunch together at twelve?
Example_CN: 我们十二点一起吃午饭好吗？

Example_EN: The washing machine stopped working this morning.
Example_CN: 洗衣机今天早上停止运转了。

Example_EN: She was mad at me for forgetting her birthday.
Example_CN: 我忘了她生日，她很生气。
MemoryTip: mad：生气或发疯（英式口语常指生气）。

Example_EN: I bought a fashion magazine at the station.
Example_CN: 我在车站买了一本时尚杂志。

Example_EN: Please send the forms by mail today.
Example_CN: 请今天把表格邮寄出去。

Example_EN: Turn left onto the main road after the bridge.
Example_CN: 过桥后左转上主路。

Example_EN: Can you make a cake for the party tonight?
Example_CN: 你能为今晚派对做一个蛋糕吗？

Example_EN: A young man helped me carry the heavy bags.
Example_CN: 一位年轻人帮我提了沉重的包。

Example_EN: How many students are in your English class?
Example_CN: 你们英语班有多少学生？

Collocation: city map;on the map;look at a map
Example_EN: We looked at a map to find the museum.
Example_CN: 我们看地图找博物馆。

Example_EN: Her birthday is in early March every year.
Example_CN: 她的生日每年三月初。

Example_EN: She got a high mark in the maths test.
Example_CN: 她数学测验得了高分。

Example_EN: We buy fresh fruit at the street market.
Example_CN: 我们在街头市场买新鲜水果。

Example_EN: They got married in a small town last year.
Example_CN: 他们去年在一座小镇结婚了。

Example_EN: He wants to marry her next summer.
Example_CN: 他想明年夏天娶她。

Example_EN: Did you watch the football match last night?
Example_CN: 你昨晚看足球比赛了吗？

Example_EN: The flowers look beautiful in May here.
Example_CN: 这里五月的花很漂亮。

Example_EN: Maybe we can meet after class tomorrow.
Example_CN: 也许我们明天课后可以见面。

Example_EN: Can you give me a glass of water, please?
Example_CN: 请给我一杯水好吗？

Example_EN: We had a big meal with the whole family.
Example_CN: 我们和全家人吃了丰盛的一餐。

Collocation: mean to;What does it mean;mean well
Example_EN: What does this word mean in the sentence?
Example_CN: 这个词在句子里是什么意思？

Example_EN: Do you know the meaning of this English word?
Example_CN: 你知道这个英语单词的意思吗？

Collocation: red meat;meat and fish;piece of meat
Example_EN: I do not eat much red meat these days.
Example_CN: 我这些天不怎么吃红肉。

Example_EN: Remember to take your medicine after meals.
Example_CN: 记得饭后吃药。

Example_EN: Shall we meet for coffee after work today?
Example_CN: 我们今天下班后见面喝咖啡好吗？

Example_EN: The team meeting will start at three o'clock.
Example_CN: 小组会议将在三点开始。

Example_EN: She is a member of the school drama club.
Example_CN: 她是学校戏剧社的成员。

Example_EN: I have a clear memory of that summer day.
Example_CN: 我对那个夏日有清晰记忆。

Collocation: on the menu;lunch menu;open the menu
Example_EN: Is fish on the menu at this restaurant?
Example_CN: 这家餐馆菜单上有鱼吗？

Collocation: send a message;leave a message;text message
Example_EN: I sent her a message about the homework.
Example_CN: 我给她发了一条关于作业的消息。

Example_EN: The table is two metres long and quite wide.
Example_CN: 这张桌子两米长，相当宽。

Example_EN: There is a cake in the middle of the table.
Example_CN: 桌子中间有一个蛋糕。

Example_EN: The shop closes at midnight on Saturdays.
Example_CN: 这家店周六午夜关门。

Example_EN: It might rain later, so take an umbrella.
Example_CN: 晚些时候可能下雨，所以带把伞。

Example_EN: Children should drink milk for strong bones.
Example_CN: 孩子们应喝牛奶长壮骨头。

Example_EN: Over two million people visited the park.
Example_CN: 超过两百万人参观了这座公园。

Collocation: change your mind;never mind;keep in mind
Example_EN: I hope you will not change your mind later.
Example_CN: 我希望你稍后不要改主意。

Collocation: this is mine;a friend of mine;coal mine
Example_EN: That red bike beside the gate is mine.
Example_CN: 大门旁那辆红自行车是我的。
MemoryTip: mine：名词性物主代词，也指矿。

Collocation: in a minute;wait a minute;sixty minutes
Example_EN: Please wait a minute while I find my keys.
Example_CN: 请等一分钟，我找一下钥匙。

Collocation: look in the mirror;bathroom mirror;rear-view mirror
Example_EN: She looked in the mirror before leaving home.
Example_CN: 出门前她照了照镜子。

Collocation: miss a bus;miss someone;miss a chance
Example_EN: I will miss you when you go to university.
Example_CN: 你上大学后我会想你的。

Example_EN: Everyone makes a mistake when learning English.
Example_CN: 学英语时每个人都会犯错。

Example_EN: Mix the eggs with the flour carefully now.
Example_CN: 现在把鸡蛋和面粉仔细拌匀。

Example_EN: He built a model of a plane at home.
Example_CN: 他在家做了一个飞机模型。

Example_EN: This modern building has many glass windows.
Example_CN: 这座现代建筑有许多玻璃窗。

Example_EN: My mum cooks dinner for us every evening.
Example_CN: 我妈妈每天晚上为我们做晚饭。

Example_EN: We have a maths test on Monday morning.
Example_CN: 我们周一上午有数学测验。

Example_EN: I try to save money for my summer holiday.
Example_CN: 我尽量存钱准备暑假旅行。

Example_EN: We visit our grandparents once a month.
Example_CN: 我们每月看望祖父母一次。
MemoryTip: month：大约三十天的一段时间。

Example_EN: There is a bright full moon in the sky.
Example_CN: 天上有一轮明亮的满月。

Example_EN: I need more time to finish this report.
Example_CN: 我需要更多时间完成这份报告。

Example_EN: I usually drink coffee every morning at eight.
Example_CN: 我通常每天早上八点喝咖啡。

Example_EN: Most students in our class like football.
Example_CN: 我们班大多数学生喜欢足球。

Example_EN: My mother teaches English at a primary school.
Example_CN: 我母亲在一所小学教英语。

Collocation: climb a mountain;mountain view;in the mountains
Example_EN: They climbed a high mountain last summer.
Example_CN: 他们去年夏天爬了一座高山。

Example_EN: Move the computer mouse to open the file.
Example_CN: 移动电脑鼠标来打开文件。

Collocation: open your mouth;mouth of;by word of mouth
Example_EN: Please open your mouth and say 'ah' now.
Example_CN: 请张开嘴说“啊”。

Example_EN: We will move to a new flat next month.
Example_CN: 我们下个月将搬到新公寓。

Collocation: watch a movie;movie star;go to the movies
Example_EN: Shall we watch a movie at home tonight?
Example_CN: 今晚我们在家看电影好吗？

Example_EN: How much does this blue shirt cost today?
Example_CN: 这件蓝衬衫今天多少钱？

Example_EN: We visited an art museum last Saturday.
Example_CN: 上周六我们参观了一家艺术博物馆。

Example_EN: I listen to music when I do my homework.
Example_CN: 我做作业时听音乐。

Example_EN: She wants to become a musician after school.
Example_CN: 她毕业后想成为音乐家。

Example_EN: You must wear a seat belt in the car.
Example_CN: 坐车时必须系安全带。

Example_EN: This is my favourite book of all time.
Example_CN: 这是我最喜欢的书。

Example_EN: I can finish this work by myself tonight.
Example_CN: 今晚我能自己完成这项工作。

Example_EN: Please write your full name on this form.
Example_CN: 请在这张表格上写下全名。

Example_EN: We visited a national park during the holiday.
Example_CN: 假期我们参观了一座国家公园。

Example_EN: Children need time to play in nature.
Example_CN: 孩子需要时间在自然中玩耍。

Example_EN: Is there a supermarket near your house?
Example_CN: 你家附近有超市吗？

Example_EN: I have nearly finished my homework today.
Example_CN: 我今天作业差不多做完了。

Example_EN: A passport is necessary for international travel.
Example_CN: 国际旅行需要护照。

Example_EN: She wore a warm scarf around her neck.
Example_CN: 她脖子上围着一条暖和的围巾。

Example_EN: You need to wear warm clothes in winter.
Example_CN: 冬天你需要穿暖和的衣服。

Example_EN: Our next-door neighbour often waters our plants.
Example_CN: 隔壁邻居常帮我们浇花。

Example_EN: I have never been to Australia before.
Example_CN: 我以前从未去过澳大利亚。

Example_EN: She bought a new phone last weekend.
Example_CN: 她上周末买了一部新手机。

Example_EN: Have you heard the good news about Tom?
Example_CN: 你听说关于汤姆的好消息了吗？
MemoryTip: news：新近发生的报道（不可数）。

Example_EN: Dad reads the newspaper every morning at breakfast.
Example_CN: 爸爸每天早饭时读报纸。

Example_EN: We will visit London next week for three days.
Example_CN: 我们下周将去伦敦三天。

Collocation: nice to meet you;nice day;nice of
Example_EN: It was nice of you to help me yesterday.
Example_CN: 你昨天帮我真好。

Example_EN: The streets are quiet at night in this town.
Example_CN: 这座小镇夜里街道很安静。

Example_EN: The shop opens at nine o'clock every morning.
Example_CN: 这家店每天早上九点开门。

Example_EN: She got her first job at nineteen.
Example_CN: 她十九岁时得到第一份工作。

Example_EN: About ninety people came to the school play.
Example_CN: 大约九十人来看学校话剧。

Example_EN: There is no milk left in the fridge.
Example_CN: 冰箱里没有牛奶了。

Example_EN: Nobody answered the phone this morning.
Example_CN: 今天早上没人接电话。

Example_EN: Please do not make a noise during the exam.
Example_CN: 考试时请不要发出噪音。

Example_EN: None of the cakes were left after the party.
Example_CN: 派对后蛋糕一点都没剩。

Example_EN: Do not talk nonsense about ghosts at night.
Example_CN: 夜里别胡说什么鬼的事。

Example_EN: We usually have lunch at noon at school.
Example_CN: 我们通常在学校正午吃午饭。

Example_EN: It is normal to feel nervous before a test.
Example_CN: 考试前紧张是正常的。

Example_EN: They live in the north of the country.
Example_CN: 他们住在这个国家的北方。

Example_EN: She had a runny nose because of the cold.
Example_CN: 她因为感冒流鼻涕。

Example_EN: I have not finished my homework yet today.
Example_CN: 我今天作业还没做完。

Example_EN: Please take notes during the history lesson.
Example_CN: 历史课上请做笔记。

Example_EN: There is nothing to eat in the kitchen.
Example_CN: 厨房里没有可吃的东西。

Example_EN: Did you notice that she looked very tired?
Example_CN: 你注意到她看上去很累吗？

Example_EN: It often rains a lot in November here.
Example_CN: 这里十一月经常下很多雨。

Example_EN: Please finish your homework right now, please.
Example_CN: 请立刻把作业做完。

Example_EN: What is your phone number for the form?
Example_CN: 表格上你的电话号码是多少？

Example_EN: The nurse checked my temperature carefully.
Example_CN: 护士仔细量了我的体温。

Example_EN: The train leaves at five o'clock sharp.
Example_CN: 火车五点整发车。

Example_EN: Leaves turn red and yellow in October.
Example_CN: 十月树叶变成红色和黄色。

Example_EN: She bought a cup of tea before the meeting.
Example_CN: 她开会前买了一杯茶。
MemoryTip: of 像从一整块里分出一小份。

Example_EN: Please turn off the lights when you leave.
Example_CN: 离开时请把灯关掉。
MemoryTip: off 像开关拨到“断”——东西离开了。

Example_EN: They offered me a job in London last week.
Example_CN: 上周他们向我提供了一份伦敦的工作。
MemoryTip: offer：把手伸出去把东西递给你。

Example_EN: She works in a quiet office near the river.
Example_CN: 她在河边一间安静的办公室上班。
MemoryTip: office 里有 “fic”，像办公桌前办正事。

Example_EN: We often walk to school when the weather is fine.
Example_CN: 天气好时我们经常步行上学。
MemoryTip: often 中间那声轻轻一顿，像事情三天两头发生。

Example_EN: Oh no, I left my keys at home again.
Example_CN: 哦不，我又把钥匙忘在家里了。
MemoryTip: oh 一张嘴就是一声短叹，反应来了。

Example_EN: Add a little olive oil to the salad please.
Example_CN: 请往沙拉里加一点橄榄油。
MemoryTip: oil 发音圆滑，像油在锅里打转。

Example_EN: Are you OK with meeting after lunch today?
Example_CN: 你今天下午饭后见面可以吗？
MemoryTip: OK 两个字母，像盖个章说“通过”。

Example_EN: My old friend visited me from Manchester yesterday.
Example_CN: 我的老朋友昨天从曼彻斯特来看我。
MemoryTip: old 开口拉长，像岁月被拉长了。

Example_EN: Please put the books on the table now.
Example_CN: 请现在把书放在桌子上。
MemoryTip: on：东西稳稳落在一个平面上。

Collocation: once a week;at once;once upon a time
Example_EN: We meet for coffee once a week after work.
Example_CN: 我们每周下班后喝一次咖啡。
MemoryTip: once = one + ce：只发生那“一”次。

Example_EN: One of my friends lives near the station.
Example_CN: 我有一个朋友住在车站附近。
MemoryTip: one 是数字起点，也常指“那一个”。

Example_EN: She chopped a large onion for the soup.
Example_CN: 她为汤剁了一个大洋葱。
MemoryTip: onion 剥一层又一层，像催人掉泪的球。

Example_EN: She often shops online for books and clothes.
Example_CN: 她经常在网上买书和衣服。
MemoryTip: on + line：挂在“线上”就是在线。

Example_EN: He is the only child in his family.
Example_CN: 他是家里的独生子。
MemoryTip: only 像一道窄门：只留这一个进去。

Example_EN: Please open the window for some fresh air.
Example_CN: 请打开窗户透透新鲜空气。
MemoryTip: open：嘴巴、门、心都张开的那一下。

Collocation: opera house;go to the opera;opera singer
Example_EN: We saw a famous opera at the city hall.
Example_CN: 我们在市政厅看了一场著名歌剧。
MemoryTip: opera 拖长了音，像台上高音唱到尾。

Example_EN: In my opinion this film is worth seeing.
Example_CN: 在我看来这部电影值得一看。
MemoryTip: opinion：把心里的看法 “opine” 说出来。

Example_EN: The bank is opposite the post office today.
Example_CN: 银行就在邮局的对面。
MemoryTip: op-posite：站在对立的位置上互相望。

Example_EN: Would you like tea or coffee with breakfast?
Example_CN: 早餐想喝茶还是咖啡？
MemoryTip: or 像岔路口：走左边还是右边。

Example_EN: She always drinks fresh orange juice at breakfast.
Example_CN: 她早餐总是喝新鲜橙汁。
MemoryTip: orange：橙子的颜色用它自己命名。

Example_EN: Can we order food from this café tonight?
Example_CN: 今晚我们能从这家咖啡馆点餐吗？
MemoryTip: order：把乱的理顺，也可“点一份”。

Collocation: ordinary life;ordinary people;out of the ordinary
Example_EN: It was just an ordinary day at the office.
Example_CN: 那不过是办公室里平常的一天。

Example_EN: Have you asked the other students about the trip?
Example_CN: 你问过其他同学关于这次旅行的事了吗？
MemoryTip: other：把“不是这个”的那一拨指出来。

Example_EN: Our house stands near the river and the park.
Example_CN: 我们的房子靠近河边和公园。
MemoryTip: our = we 的所属：这是“我们这边的”。

Collocation: of ours;a friend of ours;this is ours
Example_EN: That red bike beside the gate is ours.
Example_CN: 大门旁那辆红色自行车是我们的。
MemoryTip: ours = our + s：名词性“我们的”，后面不再接名词。

Example_EN: We cooked a simple dinner by ourselves last night.
Example_CN: 昨晚我们自己做了一顿简单的晚饭。
MemoryTip: our + selves：一群人的“自己”凑在一起。

Example_EN: She went out after finishing her homework.
Example_CN: 她做完作业后就出门了。
MemoryTip: out 像一脚跨出门，人就在外面了。

Example_EN: Please wait outside the school gate for me.
Example_CN: 请在学校大门外等我。
MemoryTip: out + side：站在建筑物的外侧面。

Example_EN: The bird flew over the tall green trees.
Example_CN: 那只鸟飞过了高大的绿树。
MemoryTip: over 像拱桥跨过去；事做完也叫 all over。

Collocation: your own;own a house;on your own
Example_EN: She hopes to own a small flat one day.
Example_CN: 她希望有一天能拥有一套小公寓。
MemoryTip: own 既是“自己的”，也是把东西真正“拥有”。

Example_EN: Please turn to page twenty in your book.
Example_CN: 请翻到你书上的第二十页。
MemoryTip: page 翻一页，就像轻拍纸角一下。

Collocation: paint a picture;wet paint;paint the wall
Example_EN: They will paint the kitchen wall this weekend.
Example_CN: 他们这个周末要粉刷厨房的墙。
MemoryTip: paint 湿湿的，刷子一抹颜色就上去。

Example_EN: We saw a famous painting in the museum.
Example_CN: 我们在博物馆里看到了一幅名画。
MemoryTip: paint + ing：画完留下来、挂在墙上的那幅。

Collocation: a pair of;pair of shoes;in pairs
Example_EN: She bought a new pair of black shoes.
Example_CN: 她买了一双新的黑鞋。
MemoryTip: pair 成双：两只鞋才叫一对。

Collocation: a piece of paper;daily paper;write on paper
Example_EN: He wrote his name on a piece of paper.
Example_CN: 他把名字写在一张纸上。
MemoryTip: paper 薄薄一张；每天的报纸也叫 paper。

Example_EN: Both parents came to the school meeting.
Example_CN: 两位家长都来参加了学校会议。
MemoryTip: parent 是家谱里上一层的爸爸或妈妈。

Collocation: city park;park the car;in the park
Example_EN: We often walk our dog in the park.
Example_CN: 我们常在公园里遛狗。
MemoryTip: park 既能“逛公园”，也能“泊车”。

Example_EN: Reading forms an important part of daily learning.
Example_CN: 阅读是日常学习的重要部分。
MemoryTip: part 像蛋糕切下来的那一块。

Collocation: business partner;dance partner;work with a partner
Example_EN: Please discuss these two questions with your partner.
Example_CN: 请与你的搭档讨论这两个问题。
MemoryTip: part + ner：一起分担一部分工作的人。

Example_EN: They will throw a birthday party on Saturday.
Example_CN: 他们周六要办一场生日聚会。
MemoryTip: party 一群人聚一起——要么狂欢，要么议政。

Collocation: pass the exam;pass the ball;pass through
Example_EN: He hopes to pass the exam next week.
Example_CN: 他希望下周能通过考试。
MemoryTip: pass 像球传出去，也像关卡顺利过关。

Example_EN: The bus stopped to pick up more passengers.
Example_CN: 公交车停下来接更多乘客。
MemoryTip: pass + enger：一路“经过、搭乘”的人。

Collocation: valid passport;passport control;apply for a passport
Example_EN: Do not forget your passport at the airport.
Example_CN: 在机场别忘记带护照。
MemoryTip: pass + port：过港口、过边境的通行证。

Example_EN: She walked past the old bookshop this morning.
Example_CN: 她今天早上走过那家旧书店。
MemoryTip: past 既是“从前”，也是从你身边“掠过”。

Example_EN: We cooked some tomato pasta for dinner tonight.
Example_CN: 今晚我们做了番茄意面当晚饭。
MemoryTip: pasta 音近“帕斯塔”，一锅热乎乎的意面。

Example_EN: Follow the garden path to the small gate.
Example_CN: 沿着花园小径走到那扇小门。
MemoryTip: path 窄窄一条，是脚一步步踩出来的路。

Example_EN: Can you pay the bill with your card?
Example_CN: 你能用卡付这笔账吗？
MemoryTip: pay：钱从口袋“付”出去，那一声就叫 pay。

Collocation: blue pen;write with a pen;ballpoint pen
Example_EN: Please sign your name with a blue pen.
Example_CN: 请用蓝色钢笔签上你的名字。
MemoryTip: pen 细细一支，墨水流过就成了字。

Example_EN: She wrote all her answers carefully in pencil.
Example_CN: 她用铅笔仔细写完了所有答案。
MemoryTip: pencil 写错能擦，考试时最放心的工具。

Example_EN: Lots of young people meet in the city park.
Example_CN: 很多年轻人在城市公园见面。
MemoryTip: people 是复数集合：别说 a people 指“一个人”。

Example_EN: Please pass the black pepper for my soup.
Example_CN: 请把黑胡椒递给我放汤里。
MemoryTip: pepper 像“泼泼”撒一点，菜就香了。

Example_EN: Tickets cost twenty pounds per person at the door.
Example_CN: 今天门票在门口每人二十英镑。
MemoryTip: per = 每一个：看价签常写 per kilo。

Example_EN: The weather was perfect for a long morning walk.
Example_CN: 天气非常适合清晨长时间散步。
MemoryTip: per-fect：做到头了，几乎挑不出毛病。

Example_EN: Perhaps we can visit the museum together tomorrow.
Example_CN: 也许我们明天可以一起去博物馆。
MemoryTip: per-haps：hap 想成 happen——也许会发生。

Example_EN: She stayed abroad for a short period last year.
Example_CN: 她去年在国外待了一小段时间。
MemoryTip: period 句末那个点，也像一段时间画上句号。

Collocation: a young person;the right person;per person
Example_EN: She is the right person for this difficult job.
Example_CN: 她是这份困难工作的合适人选。
MemoryTip: person 指单个的人；people 多指一群。

Example_EN: Please keep all your personal details private online.
Example_CN: 请在网上保护好你的全部个人资料。
MemoryTip: personal = person + al：属于某个人的。

Example_EN: Our family pet always sleeps beside the warm sofa.
Example_CN: 我们家的宠物总爱睡在暖和的沙发旁。
MemoryTip: pet 又短又软，像摸宠物时轻声叫它。

Collocation: petrol station;petrol price;fill up with petrol
Example_EN: We stopped at a petrol station near the town.
Example_CN: 我们在镇附近的加油站停了下来。
MemoryTip: petrol（英）= gasoline（美）：记英国加油站牌。

Collocation: mobile phone;on the phone;phone a friend
Example_EN: I will phone a friend after dinner tonight.
Example_CN: 今晚晚饭后我给朋友打个电话。
MemoryTip: phone 可当名词也可当动词：直接 phone her。

Example_EN: She took a photo of the quiet blue lake.
Example_CN: 她拍了一张安静蓝色湖面的照片。
MemoryTip: photo 是 photograph 的口语短版。

Collocation: take a photograph;old photograph;photograph the view
Example_EN: He wanted to photograph the view from high above.
Example_CN: 他想从高处拍下这处景色。

Example_EN: Please learn this useful phrase carefully before class.
Example_CN: 请在课前仔细学会这个有用的短语。
MemoryTip: phrase 比单词长一点，像一小串话。

Example_EN: She has a piano lesson every Thursday morning.
Example_CN: 她每周四上午有钢琴课。
MemoryTip: piano 结尾像“噢”，琴声一响就想起它。

Example_EN: Please pick a team for the next big match.
Example_CN: 请为下场大赛挑选一支队伍。
MemoryTip: pick 像用手掂一掂再挑出来。

Collocation: take a picture;draw a picture;in the picture
Example_EN: Can you draw a picture of your new house?
Example_CN: 你能画一幅你新房子的图吗？
MemoryTip: picture 里有 pict：像把画面 pict 出来。

Collocation: a piece of cake;piece of paper;one piece
Example_EN: Could I have one piece of cake after lunch?
Example_CN: 午饭后可以给我一块蛋糕吗？
MemoryTip: piece 发音像 peace，切下一小块就平静了。

Example_EN: The farm pig rolled happily in the soft mud.
Example_CN: 农场的猪开心地在软泥里打滚。
MemoryTip: pig 很短，像猪哼一声的口型。

Example_EN: She wore a bright pink dress to school today.
Example_CN: 她今天穿了件亮粉色连衣裙去学校。
MemoryTip: pink 像花瓣“乒”地一下展开的粉。

Example_EN: We decided to order a pizza after work today.
Example_CN: 我们决定今天下班后点一份披萨。
MemoryTip: pizza 双 z 像芝士丝拉得很长。

Collocation: a quiet place;in place;place an order
Example_EN: This park is a quiet place for serious reading.
Example_CN: 这座公园是安静认真阅读的好地方。
MemoryTip: place 既是“地方”，也是把东西“放妥”。

Example_EN: We need to make a clear plan for the trip.
Example_CN: 我们需要为这次旅行订个清晰计划。
MemoryTip: plan 像在纸上画平直的路线。

Example_EN: We will travel by plane next Monday morning.
Example_CN: 下周一早上我们坐飞机旅行。
MemoryTip: plane 词短，像飞机掠过地平线一样平。

Collocation: house plant;plant a tree;grow a plant
Example_EN: They will plant a tree in the school garden.
Example_CN: 他们将在学校花园里种一棵树。
MemoryTip: plant 把东西“往下按”，就种进土里了。

Example_EN: She put the food in a plastic bag carefully.
Example_CN: 她小心地把食物放进塑料袋里。
MemoryTip: plastic 发音像“拍死它刻”，塑胶一拍就定型。

Example_EN: Please put the chicken on a clean plate.
Example_CN: 请把鸡肉放到干净的盘子上。
MemoryTip: plate 扁平，像一张“平的台”。

Example_EN: The children play football after school every day.
Example_CN: 孩子们每天放学后踢足球。
MemoryTip: play 可玩球、可弹琴：play 把快乐玩起来。

Example_EN: He wants to be a football player one day.
Example_CN: 他希望有一天成为足球运动员。
MemoryTip: play + er：玩游戏的人就是 player。

Example_EN: Please help me carry these heavy bags upstairs.
Example_CN: 请帮我把这些沉重的袋子搬上楼。
MemoryTip: please 像礼貌开关：一开口就先说 please。

Example_EN: I am very pleased with your careful homework tonight.
Example_CN: 我对你今晚认真完成的作业很满意。
MemoryTip: please + d：被取悦后的高兴状态。

Example_EN: There is plenty of time before the train leaves.
Example_CN: 火车出发前还有充足的时间。
MemoryTip: plenty 像“满得扑棱一下”，到处都够用。

Example_EN: The total cost is forty pounds plus tax.
Example_CN: 总费用是四十英镑外加税。
MemoryTip: plus 是加号 +，看见就往上加。

Example_EN: He put the train tickets in his jacket pocket.
Example_CN: 他把火车票放进夹克口袋里。
MemoryTip: pocket 像衣服上的小“包包刻”进去。

Example_EN: She wrote a short poem about spring rain.
Example_CN: 她写了一首关于春雨的短诗。
MemoryTip: poem 开口 o，像朗诵时拖长的韵脚。

Example_EN: She tried to point out the mistake very politely.
Example_CN: 她很有礼貌地指出了那个错误。
MemoryTip: point 像手指尖：点到为止、一把指出。

Example_EN: You should call the police if you feel unsafe.
Example_CN: 若感觉不安全，你应当报警。
MemoryTip: police 常当复数用：The police are coming。

Example_EN: It is polite to say thank you after meals.
Example_CN: 饭后说谢谢是有礼貌的。

Collocation: swimming pool;pool party;deep end of the pool
Example_EN: We swam in the outdoor swimming pool all afternoon.
Example_CN: 我们整个下午都在室外游泳池游泳。
MemoryTip: pool 圆圆一汪水，像拼写里两个 o 的水涡。

Example_EN: The poor lighting made the room look cold and small.
Example_CN: 糟糕的灯光让房间显得又冷又小。
MemoryTip: poor 拉长 o，像叹一口气：啊，太差了。

Example_EN: That comedy show is very popular with young people.
Example_CN: 那个喜剧节目很受年轻人欢迎。
MemoryTip: pop + ular：流行的像“破普”一声传开。

Example_EN: She applied for a teaching position at our school.
Example_CN: 她申请了我们学校的一个教师职位。

Example_EN: Try to stay positive during the difficult exam week.
Example_CN: 艰难的考试周期间尽量保持积极。
MemoryTip: positive 像加号能量，往上推。

Example_EN: Is it possible to finish the report by Friday?
Example_CN: 周五前完成这份报告可能吗？
MemoryTip: possible 对着 impossible：去掉 im 就“可能”。

Example_EN: I will post this letter at the corner shop.
Example_CN: 我会在街角那家店把这封信寄出去。
MemoryTip: 英式 post = 邮寄；岗位也叫 post，像站岗的点。

Example_EN: She mashed the potato with butter and salt.
Example_CN: 她用黄油和盐把土豆捣烂。
MemoryTip: po-ta-to 三拍，像挖出土豆的节奏。

Example_EN: This cake costs about one pound in that shop.
Example_CN: 这块蛋糕在那家店大约要一英镑。
MemoryTip: 英镑符号 £，念 pound，别和“重击”的动词晕掉。

Example_EN: Football practice starts at four o'clock this afternoon.
Example_CN: 今天下午四点开始足球训练。
MemoryTip: 英式名词用 practice：有 ce 像“册”，练成一本册。

Example_EN: You should practise the piano for thirty minutes daily.
Example_CN: 你每天应该练三十分钟钢琴。
MemoryTip: 英式动词用 practise：有 se 像“做”，动起来练。

Collocation: prefer to;prefer tea;prefer A to B
Example_EN: I prefer tea to coffee in the morning.
Example_CN: 早上我更喜欢喝茶而不是咖啡。
MemoryTip: pre + fer：事先把喜好“端”过来。

Example_EN: Please prepare dinner before the guests arrive tonight.
Example_CN: 请在客人今晚到达前准备好晚饭。

Example_EN: She gave me a lovely present for my birthday.
Example_CN: 她送给我一份可爱的生日礼物。
MemoryTip: 重音：ˈpreznt 礼物/现在，priˈzent 赠送。

Example_EN: The president will visit our school next Monday.
Example_CN: 总统下周一会来我们学校访问。

Example_EN: Please press the green button to start the machine.
Example_CN: 请按绿色按钮启动机器。

Example_EN: The garden looks pretty after the spring rain.
Example_CN: 春雨过后花园显得很漂亮。
MemoryTip: pretty 既有“漂亮”也有口语“相当”。

Example_EN: The price of this ticket is too high for us.
Example_CN: 这张票的价格对我们来说太高了。

Example_EN: My sister teaches at a primary school nearby.
Example_CN: 我姐姐在附近一所小学教书。

Example_EN: He spent two years in prison for the crime.
Example_CN: 他因那起罪行坐了两年牢。

Example_EN: They discussed the matter in a private room.
Example_CN: 他们在一间私人房间里讨论了这件事。

Example_EN: She won first prize in the school art contest.
Example_CN: 她在学校美术比赛中获得一等奖。
MemoryTip: prize 像 praise：因出色而获奖。

Example_EN: It will probably rain later this afternoon.
Example_CN: 今天下午晚些时候大概会下雨。

Example_EN: We need to solve this problem before Friday.
Example_CN: 我们需要在周五前解决这个问题。

Example_EN: This new product is already popular in shops.
Example_CN: 这款新产品已经在商店里很受欢迎。

Example_EN: Which TV programme do you usually watch at night?
Example_CN: 你晚上通常看哪个电视节目？
MemoryTip: 英式 programme；美式常写作 program。

Example_EN: She has made good progress in English this year.
Example_CN: 她今年在英语上取得了很好的进步。

Example_EN: Our group project is due next Wednesday morning.
Example_CN: 我们的小组项目下周三上午截止。
MemoryTip: project：伸出去做的一件大任务。

Collocation: make a promise;keep a promise;promise to
Example_EN: He promised to call me after the meeting.
Example_CN: 他承诺会后给我打电话。

Collocation: pronounce clearly;pronounce a word;hard to pronounce
Example_EN: Can you pronounce this word more slowly, please?
Example_CN: 你能把这个词再念慢一点吗？

Example_EN: I am proud of my sister for her hard work.
Example_CN: 我为妹妹的努力感到骄傲。

Example_EN: Many people use public transport in this city.
Example_CN: 这座城市里很多人使用公共交通。

Example_EN: Please pull the door gently and come inside.
Example_CN: 请轻轻拉开门走进来。
MemoryTip: pull 往自己这边拉；push 是推。

Example_EN: Every pupil must wear a uniform to school.
Example_CN: 每位小学生上学都必须穿校服。
MemoryTip: 英式 pupil 常指中小学生。

Example_EN: She chose a purple dress for the party tonight.
Example_CN: 她为今晚的派对选了一条紫色连衣裙。

Collocation: on purpose;main purpose;for the purpose of
Example_EN: What is the main purpose of this meeting today?
Example_CN: 今天这次会议的主要目的是什么？

Example_EN: You need to push the door to open it fully.
Example_CN: 你需要用力推门才能完全打开。
MemoryTip: push 往外用力；与 pull 相对。

Example_EN: Please put your books on the table now.
Example_CN: 请现在把书放在桌子上。

Collocation: a quarter past;quarter of an hour;first quarter
Example_EN: The train leaves at a quarter past nine.
Example_CN: 火车在九点一刻发车。
MemoryTip: quarter = 四分之一，也指十五分钟。

Example_EN: The queen waved to the crowd from the balcony.
Example_CN: 女王从阳台上向人群挥手。
MemoryTip: queen 与 king 成对记忆。

Collocation: ask a question;answer a question;without question
Example_EN: Please ask a question if you do not understand.
Example_CN: 如果不明白，请提问。

Example_EN: We only have time for a quick lunch today.
Example_CN: 我们今天只有时间吃顿快捷午餐。

Example_EN: Please finish the form quickly and return it.
Example_CN: 请赶快填完表格并交回来。

Example_EN: Please keep quiet while others are reading.
Example_CN: 别人在阅读时请保持安静。

Example_EN: The film was quite good, so we watched it twice.
Example_CN: 这部电影相当好看，所以我们看了两遍。
MemoryTip: quite ≠ quiet：一个“相当”，一个“安静”。

Example_EN: We have a short quiz at the start of class.
Example_CN: 我们在课开始时有一个小测验。
MemoryTip: quiz 比 exam 更短、更轻松。

Example_EN: A small rabbit jumped across the garden path.
Example_CN: 一只小兔子跳过花园小径。

Collocation: win a race;car race;race against time
Example_EN: He trained hard to win the race last Saturday.
Example_CN: 他刻苦训练，想在上周六的比赛中获胜。
MemoryTip: race 可指赛跑，也可指种族。

Collocation: listen to the radio;radio station;on the radio
Example_EN: I listen to the radio every morning at breakfast.
Example_CN: 我每天早饭时听收音机。

Example_EN: We met at the railway station before the trip.
Example_CN: 出发前我们在火车站会合。
MemoryTip: rail + way：铁轨铺成的路（英式）。

Example_EN: Heavy rain stopped the outdoor football match.
Example_CN: 大雨让户外足球比赛停了下来。

Example_EN: Take an umbrella because it is a rainy day.
Example_CN: 今天是雨天，带上雨伞吧。

Example_EN: Please raise your hand if you know the answer.
Example_CN: 如果知道答案请举手。
MemoryTip: raise 是及物：把某物抬高。

Example_EN: I would rather stay at home tonight than go out.
Example_CN: 我今晚宁愿待在家里也不出去。

Collocation: reach home;reach an agreement;out of reach
Example_EN: We hope to reach the hotel before dark tonight.
Example_CN: 我们希望今晚天黑前到达酒店。

Example_EN: I read a short story on the bus this morning.
Example_CN: 今天早上我在公交车上读了一篇短篇小说。
MemoryTip: read 过去式拼写相同，发音不同。

Example_EN: This magazine is popular with young readers.
Example_CN: 这本杂志很受年轻读者欢迎。

Example_EN: She spends an hour every evening on reading.
Example_CN: 她每天晚上花一小时阅读。

Example_EN: Are you ready for the exam tomorrow morning?
Example_CN: 你为明天上午的考试准备好了吗？

Example_EN: Is this a real story or only a film scene?
Example_CN: 这是真实故事还是只是电影情节？

Collocation: realise that;come to realise;realise a dream
Example_EN: I did not realise how late it already was.
Example_CN: 我没意识到已经这么晚了。

Example_EN: Do you really want to leave so early today?
Example_CN: 你今天真的想这么早离开吗？

Example_EN: The main reason for the delay was heavy traffic.
Example_CN: 延误的主要原因是交通拥堵。

Collocation: receive a letter;receive news;receive a gift
Example_EN: I received your email early this morning.
Example_CN: 我今早早早收到了你的电子邮件。

Example_EN: His most recent book sold very well abroad.
Example_CN: 他最近的一本书在国外卖得很好。

Example_EN: Have you seen her recently at the library?
Example_CN: 你最近在图书馆见过她吗？

Example_EN: This recipe for chocolate cake is quite easy.
Example_CN: 这个巧克力蛋糕的食谱相当简单。

Example_EN: I almost did not recognise him with short hair.
Example_CN: 他剪了短发，我差点没认出他。

Example_EN: Can you recommend a good restaurant near here?
Example_CN: 你能推荐附近一家好餐馆吗？
MemoryTip: re + commend：把好东西再次推荐。

Collocation: keep a record;break a record;record a song
Example_EN: Please keep a record of all your daily costs.
Example_CN: 请记录下你每天的全部开销。

Example_EN: Stop when the traffic light turns red ahead.
Example_CN: 前面红灯亮时请停车。

Example_EN: We should reduce waste by using less plastic.
Example_CN: 我们应该少用塑料来减少浪费。

Collocation: in the refrigerator;open the refrigerator;refrigerator door
Example_EN: Please put the milk back in the refrigerator.
Example_CN: 请把牛奶放回冰箱。

Example_EN: She refused to answer the difficult question.
Example_CN: 她拒绝回答那个难题。

Example_EN: This region is famous for its green tea.
Example_CN: 这一地区因绿茶而闻名。
MemoryTip: region：比 city 更大的地带。

Collocation: regular customer;on a regular basis;regular time
Example_EN: He is a regular customer at this small café.
Example_CN: 他是这家小咖啡馆的常客。

Example_EN: She has a close relationship with her parents.
Example_CN: 她与父母关系很亲近。

Collocation: relax after work;relax at home;try to relax
Example_EN: I like to relax with music after a long day.
Example_CN: 忙完漫长的一天后，我喜欢听音乐放松。

Collocation: world religion;freedom of religion;religion and culture
Example_EN: They respect every religion in their community.
Example_CN: 他们尊重社区里的每一种宗教。

Example_EN: Please remain seated until the plane stops.
Example_CN: 请一直坐着，直到飞机停稳。

Example_EN: Please remember to lock the door when you leave.
Example_CN: 离开时请记得锁门。

Example_EN: Please remind me to buy bread after class.
Example_CN: 请提醒我下课后买面包。

Collocation: remove a stain;remove from;remove the lid
Example_EN: Please remove your shoes before entering the room.
Example_CN: 进屋前请脱掉鞋子。

Collocation: pay the rent;rent a flat;for rent
Example_EN: We decided to rent a flat near the university.
Example_CN: 我们决定在大学附近租一套公寓。

Example_EN: Can you repair my bike before the weekend?
Example_CN: 你能在周末前修好我的自行车吗？

Collocation: repeat after me;repeat a question;repeat the process
Example_EN: Could you repeat the question more slowly, please?
Example_CN: 你能把问题再慢一点重复一遍吗？

Example_EN: I need to replace the old battery in this clock.
Example_CN: 我需要更换这座钟里的旧电池。
MemoryTip: re + place：放到原位置换上新的。

Example_EN: Please reply to this email by Friday afternoon.
Example_CN: 请在周五下午前回复这封邮件。

Example_EN: Students must write a short report after the trip.
Example_CN: 旅行结束后学生必须写一份简短报告。
MemoryTip: re + port：把情况带回港口汇报。

Example_EN: A news reporter asked him about the accident.
Example_CN: 一位新闻记者向他询问事故情况。

Example_EN: She is doing research on local history this term.
Example_CN: 她这学期在做当地历史研究。

Example_EN: We should show respect to older people always.
Example_CN: 我们应当始终尊重年长者。
MemoryTip: re + spect：再看一眼，因敬重而看。

Example_EN: You should have a rest after the long walk.
Example_CN: 长途步行后你应该休息一下。
MemoryTip: rest 既是休息，也指“其余”。

Example_EN: We booked a table at an Italian restaurant.
Example_CN: 我们在一家意大利餐馆订了位子。

Example_EN: The test result will be ready on Monday morning.
Example_CN: 考试结果周一上午就会出来。

Example_EN: Please return the library book before Friday.
Example_CN: 请在周五前把图书馆的书还回去。

Example_EN: She cooked a large bowl of rice for dinner.
Example_CN: 她晚饭煮了一大碗米饭。

Example_EN: This soup is rich in vitamins and flavour.
Example_CN: 这碗汤维生素丰富、味道很浓。

Collocation: ride a bike;go for a ride;bus ride
Example_EN: Children love to ride a bike in the park.
Example_CN: 孩子们喜欢在公园里骑自行车。

Example_EN: Turn right at the next traffic lights, please.
Example_CN: 请在下一个红绿灯处右转。

Collocation: wedding ring;ring the bell;give a ring
Example_EN: Please ring the bell if nobody opens the door.
Example_CN: 如果没人开门，请按门铃。

Example_EN: The sun will rise earlier tomorrow morning.
Example_CN: 明天早上太阳会升得更早。
MemoryTip: rise 常不及物；raise 是及物。

Example_EN: Do not take a risk when you cross the road.
Example_CN: 过马路时不要冒险。

Example_EN: We walked along the river after dinner yesterday.
Example_CN: 昨天晚饭后我们沿着河边散步。

Example_EN: There was a long traffic jam on the main road.
Example_CN: 主路上堵车堵了很久。
MemoryTip: road：车走的路（常比 street 更宽）。

Example_EN: They like listening to rock music on weekends.
Example_CN: 他们周末喜欢听摇滚乐。

Example_EN: Teachers play an important role in our lives.
Example_CN: 老师在我们的生活中扮演重要角色。
MemoryTip: role：舞台或生活中的那一份职责。

Example_EN: There is a small garden on the flat roof.
Example_CN: 平屋顶上有一座小花园。

Example_EN: Is there enough room for another chair here?
Example_CN: 这里还够再放一把椅子吗？
MemoryTip: room 既是房间，也是“空间”。

Example_EN: They sat at a round table near the window.
Example_CN: 他们坐在靠窗的圆桌旁。

Example_EN: Exercise is part of my daily routine now.
Example_CN: 锻炼现在已成为我日常习惯的一部分。

Collocation: in a row;front row;row of houses
Example_EN: We sat in the front row at the cinema.
Example_CN: 我们坐在电影院的前排。

Example_EN: Please put the rubbish in the bin outside.
Example_CN: 请把垃圾放到外面的桶里。
MemoryTip: 英式 rubbish = 垃圾；美式常说 garbage/trash。

Example_EN: It is rude to interrupt people while they speak.
Example_CN: 打断别人说话是无礼的。
MemoryTip: 拼写盯住 rude 的元音，词义记「无礼的」。

Collocation: break a rule;follow the rules;as a rule
Example_EN: Students must follow every rule in this school.
Example_CN: 学生必须遵守学校里的每条规则。
MemoryTip: rule 可与近义词对比，突出「规则」。

Collocation: run fast;run a business;go for a run
Example_EN: I run in the park for thirty minutes every morning.
Example_CN: 我每天早上在公园跑步三十分钟。
MemoryTip: 拼写盯住 run 的元音，词义记「跑」。

Example_EN: She is a fast runner on the school athletics team.
Example_CN: 她是学校田径队里跑得很快的选手。
MemoryTip: runner ≈「跑步者」；多看例句里的用法位置。

Example_EN: He felt sad when his best friend moved away.
Example_CN: 最好的朋友搬走时，他很难过。
MemoryTip: 拼写盯住 sad 的元音，词义记「难过的」。

Example_EN: Keep your passport in a safe place during travel.
Example_CN: 旅行时把护照放在安全的地方。
MemoryTip: safe ≈「安全的」；多看例句里的用法位置。

Example_EN: They will sail across the lake tomorrow morning.
Example_CN: 他们明天早上将乘船横渡湖泊。
MemoryTip: sail：抓住核心义「航行」，再连搭配一起记。

Example_EN: I ordered a green salad with my lunch today.
Example_CN: 我今天午餐点了一份蔬菜沙拉。
MemoryTip: 拼写盯住 salad 的元音，词义记「沙拉」。

Example_EN: Her monthly salary covers rent and food easily.
Example_CN: 她的月薪足够轻松支付房租和伙食。
MemoryTip: salary ≈「薪水」；多看例句里的用法位置。

Example_EN: These shoes are on sale until Sunday evening.
Example_CN: 这些鞋子促销到周日晚上。
MemoryTip: 把 sale 放进一句自己的日常英语里。

Collocation: add salt;salt and pepper;too much salt
Example_EN: Please add a little salt to the soup now.
Example_CN: 请现在往汤里加一点盐。
