Example_EN: I bought a spelling at the corner shop today.
Example_CN: 我今天在街角小店买了拼写。
MemoryTip: spelling ≈「拼写」；注意它在句中的位置。

Example_EN: I spend too much time on my phone.
Example_CN: 我在手机上花的时间太多了。

Example_EN: Football is my favourite sport at school.
Example_CN: 足球是我在学校最喜欢的运动。

Example_EN: We found a free parking spot near the shop.
Example_CN: 我们在商店附近找到一个空车位。

Example_EN: Flowers come out in spring every year.
Example_CN: 每年春天花都会开放。

Example_EN: We met in the town square after lunch.
Example_CN: 午饭后我们在市政广场见面。

Example_EN: We talked about the stadium after class today.
Example_CN: 今天课后我们谈论了这个体育场。
MemoryTip: 看见 stadium 先想画面，再对应「体育场」。

Example_EN: We talked about the staff after class today.
Example_CN: 今天课后我们谈论了这个员工。
MemoryTip: 看见 staff 先想画面，再对应「员工」。

Example_EN: She felt nervous before going on stage.
Example_CN: 上台前她感到紧张。

Example_EN: We talked about the stairs after class today.
Example_CN: 今天课后我们谈论了这个楼梯。
MemoryTip: 拼写盯住 stairs，词义先记「楼梯」。

Example_EN: I need a postage stamp for this letter.
Example_CN: 这封信我需要一张邮票。

Example_EN: Please stand up when the teacher comes in.
Example_CN: 老师进来时请起立。

Collocation: movie star;star in the sky;star rating
Example_EN: We watched the stars in the sky at night.
Example_CN: 夜里我们观看天上的星星。

Example_EN: Classes start at eight o'clock each morning.
Example_CN: 每天早上八点开始上课。

Example_EN: Pay attention to the statement before you continue.
Example_CN: 继续之前请先注意这个陈述。
MemoryTip: statement 与近义词对比，突出「陈述」这一义。

Example_EN: We will meet at the train station at nine.
Example_CN: 我们九点在火车站见面。

Example_EN: I will stay at my uncle's house tonight.
Example_CN: 今晚我将住在叔叔家。

Example_EN: She put the steak back on the shelf carefully.
Example_CN: 她小心地把牛排放回了架子上。
MemoryTip: 把 steak（牛排）放进自己的一句英语里。

Example_EN: Someone tried to steal a bike in the park.
Example_CN: 有人试图在公园偷一辆自行车。

Collocation: take a step;step by step;front step
Example_EN: Please watch your step on the wet floor.
Example_CN: 湿地板上请小心脚下。

Example_EN: Are you still waiting for the bus outside?
Example_CN: 你还在外面等公交车吗？

Collocation: stomach ache;empty stomach;on an empty stomach
Example_EN: He stayed home because of a stomach ache.
Example_CN: 他因为胃疼待在家里。

Example_EN: Please stop talking during the exam now.
Example_CN: 考试时请停止讲话。

Example_EN: We bought milk at the corner store today.
Example_CN: 我们今天在街角小店买了牛奶。

Example_EN: A heavy storm damaged several trees last night.
Example_CN: 昨夜一场大风暴损坏了几棵树。

Example_EN: Grandma told us a funny story after dinner.
Example_CN: 晚饭后奶奶给我们讲了个好笑的故事。

Example_EN: Go straight ahead and you will see the bank.
Example_CN: 一直往前走，你就会看见银行。

Example_EN: I heard a strange noise outside the window.
Example_CN: 我听到窗外有奇怪的声音。

Example_EN: There is a stranger near our school gate.
Example_CN: 我们学校门口附近有陌生人。
MemoryTip: 看见 stranger 先想画面，再对应「陌生人」。

Example_EN: There is a café across the street from here.
Example_CN: 从这里过马路有一家咖啡馆。

Example_EN: There was a strong wind along the coast.
Example_CN: 沿海有强风。

Example_EN: She is a university student in Manchester.
Example_CN: 她是曼彻斯特的一名大学生。

Example_EN: I need to study hard for tomorrow's exam.
Example_CN: 我需要为明天的考试努力学习。

Example_EN: We talked about the style after class today.
Example_CN: 今天课后我们谈论了这个风格。
MemoryTip: 拼写盯住 style，词义先记「风格」。

Example_EN: Maths is my favourite subject at school.
Example_CN: 数学是我在学校最喜欢的科目。

Example_EN: Hard work was the secret of her success.
Example_CN: 努力工作是她成功的秘诀。

Example_EN: He became a successful writer after years of practice.
Example_CN: 经过多年练习，他成了成功作家。

Collocation: such as;such a;in such a way
Example_EN: I have never seen such a beautiful sunset.
Example_CN: 我从未见过如此美丽的日落。

Example_EN: The car stopped suddenly in the middle of the road.
Example_CN: 汽车在路中间突然停住了。

Example_EN: Please add a little sugar to my coffee.
Example_CN: 请往我的咖啡里加一点糖。

Example_EN: I suggest that we leave early tomorrow morning.
Example_CN: 我建议我们明天一早离开。

Example_EN: This blue jacket does not suit me well.
Example_CN: 这件蓝夹克不太适合我。

Example_EN: There is a suitcase near our school gate.
Example_CN: 我们学校门口附近有手提箱。
MemoryTip: suitcase：核心义「手提箱」，再记一两个搭配。

Example_EN: We usually go to the beach in summer.
Example_CN: 我们夏天通常去海滩。

Example_EN: Do not sit in the sun without a hat.
Example_CN: 不戴帽子别在太阳下坐太久。

Example_EN: We often visit grandparents on Sunday afternoon.
Example_CN: 我们常在周日下午看望祖父母。

Example_EN: Mum buys food at the supermarket every week.
Example_CN: 妈妈每周在超市买食品。

Example_EN: My parents always support me when I feel sad.
Example_CN: 我难过时父母总是支持我。

Example_EN: Please make sure you lock the door tonight.
Example_CN: 请确保今晚锁好门。

Example_EN: We talked about the surname after class today.
Example_CN: 今天课后我们谈论了这个姓。
MemoryTip: 拼写盯住 surname，词义先记「姓」。

Example_EN: There is a surprise near our school gate.
Example_CN: 我们学校门口附近有惊讶。
MemoryTip: surprise ≈「惊讶」；注意它在句中的位置。

Example_EN: She felt surprised after talking with her teacher.
Example_CN: 和老师谈过之后，她感到感到惊讶的。
MemoryTip: surprised 与近义词对比，突出「感到惊讶的」这一义。

Example_EN: He gave a surprising answer during the short test.
Example_CN: 小测验时他给出了令人惊讶的的回答。
MemoryTip: surprising：核心义「令人惊讶的」，再记一两个搭配。

Example_EN: This bag looks sweet next to the blue one.
Example_CN: 这个包放在蓝色那个旁边显得甜的。
MemoryTip: 把 sweet（甜的）放进自己的一句英语里。

Example_EN: Can you swim a little more slowly, please?
Example_CN: 你能再慢一点游泳吗？
MemoryTip: 看见 swim 先想画面，再对应「游泳」。

Example_EN: We talked about the swimming after class today.
Example_CN: 今天课后我们谈论了这个游泳。
MemoryTip: 把 swimming（游泳）放进自己的一句英语里。

Collocation: try to switch;switch at once;switch later
Example_EN: They decided to switch after a short team discussion.
Example_CN: 简短的小组讨论后，他们决定切换。
MemoryTip: switch：切换频道，也指墙上的开关。

Example_EN: The school has a new system for online homework.
Example_CN: 学校有了一套新的在线作业系统。

Collocation: dinner table;on the table;set the table
Example_EN: Please put the plates on the table now.
Example_CN: 请现在把盘子放在桌子上。
MemoryTip: table：用餐或摆放物品的桌子。

Collocation: tablet computer;take a tablet;on the tablet
Example_EN: She reads the news on her tablet each morning.
Example_CN: 她每天早上在平板电脑上看新闻。

Example_EN: It will take about twenty minutes to walk there.
Example_CN: 走到那里大约要二十分钟。
MemoryTip: take：拿走、花费时间，搭配很多。

Example_EN: We need to talk about the school trip tomorrow.
Example_CN: 我们需要明天谈谈学校旅行的事。

Example_EN: He is taller than most boys in his class.
Example_CN: 他比班里大多数男生都高。
MemoryTip: tall：多指人身高或建筑物高。

Example_EN: We took a taxi to the station in the rain.
Example_CN: 下雨时我们打车去了车站。

Example_EN: Would you like a cup of tea after dinner?
Example_CN: 晚饭后想喝杯茶吗？

Example_EN: My aunt teaches English at a primary school.
Example_CN: 我阿姨在一所小学教英语。

Example_EN: Our maths teacher explained the problem clearly.
Example_CN: 我们数学老师把问题讲得很清楚。

Example_EN: Our school football team won the match today.
Example_CN: 我们学校足球队今天赢了比赛。
MemoryTip: team：一起为目标努力的一群人。

Example_EN: Many teenagers spend too much time on phones.
Example_CN: 许多青少年花太多时间在手机上。

Example_EN: Please answer the telephone if it rings.
Example_CN: 如果电话响了请接听。

Example_EN: We watched a film on television last night.
Example_CN: 昨晚我们在电视上看了一部电影。

Collocation: tell a story;tell someone;tell the truth
Example_EN: Can you tell me the way to the station?
Example_CN: 你能告诉我去车站的路吗？

Example_EN: His temperature was high, so he stayed in bed.
Example_CN: 他体温偏高，所以躺在床上。

Example_EN: The shop opens at ten o'clock every morning.
Example_CN: 这家店每天早上十点开门。

Example_EN: We played tennis in the park on Sunday.
Example_CN: 我们周日在公园打了网球。

Collocation: put up a tent;in a tent;camping tent
Example_EN: We slept in a tent during the school camp.
Example_CN: 学校露营时我们睡在帐篷里。

Example_EN: Exams will begin at the end of term.
Example_CN: 考试将在学期末开始。

Example_EN: The weather was terrible during our holiday.
Example_CN: 我们度假时天气糟透了。

Example_EN: We have an English test on Friday morning.
Example_CN: 我们周五上午有英语测验。

Collocation: text message;send a text;in the text
Example_EN: I sent her a text about the homework.
Example_CN: 我给她发了一条关于作业的短信。

Example_EN: This book is better than the one I read.
Example_CN: 这本书比我读过的那本更好。

Example_EN: I want to thank you for your kind help.
Example_CN: 我想感谢你好心的帮助。

Example_EN: Thanks for helping me with my heavy bags.
Example_CN: 谢谢你帮我拿那些重包。

Example_EN: That film was much better than I expected.
Example_CN: 那部电影比我预期的好得多。
MemoryTip: that：较远的“那个”，或引导从句。

Example_EN: The sun was shining brightly this morning.
Example_CN: 今天早上阳光灿烂。

Collocation: at the theatre;theatre ticket;go to the theatre
Example_EN: We bought tickets for the theatre this weekend.
Example_CN: 我们买了这周末剧院的票。
MemoryTip: 英式 theatre；美式常拼 theater。

Example_EN: Their house is near the park and the school.
Example_CN: 他们的房子靠近公园和学校。

Example_EN: That red car across the street is theirs.
Example_CN: 马路对面那辆红车是他们的。
MemoryTip: theirs：名词性“他们的”，后不接名词。

Example_EN: Please give them these books after class.
Example_CN: 请在课后把这些书交给他们。

Example_EN: The children walked home by themselves today.
Example_CN: 孩子们今天自己走回家。

Example_EN: First finish your homework, and then you may play.
Example_CN: 先做完作业，然后才能玩。

Example_EN: Is there a supermarket near your house?
Example_CN: 你家附近有超市吗？
MemoryTip: there：那边，或 there is 结构。

Example_EN: These books belong to the school library.
Example_CN: 这些书属于学校图书馆。

Example_EN: They want to visit the museum after lunch.
Example_CN: 他们想午饭后去参观博物馆。

Example_EN: There was thick fog on the road this morning.
Example_CN: 今早路上雾很浓。

Example_EN: Be careful; the ice on the lake is thin.
Example_CN: 小心，湖上的冰很薄。

Example_EN: The most important thing is to stay calm.
Example_CN: 最重要的是保持冷静。

Example_EN: What do you think about this new idea?
Example_CN: 你觉得这个新主意怎么样？

Example_EN: Her office is on the third floor of this building.
Example_CN: 她的办公室在这座楼的三层。

Example_EN: I feel thirsty after playing football outside.
Example_CN: 在外面踢完足球后我感到口渴。

Example_EN: She started secondary school at thirteen.
Example_CN: 她十三岁进中学。

Example_EN: The meeting will last about thirty minutes today.
Example_CN: 今天会议大约持续三十分钟。

Example_EN: This morning I walked to school with my sister.
Example_CN: 今天早上我和姐姐步行去学校。

Example_EN: Those books on the shelf belong to my brother.
Example_CN: 架子上那些书是我哥哥的。

Example_EN: Even though it was raining, we went for a walk.
Example_CN: 尽管下着雨，我们还是去散步了。

Example_EN: I suddenly had a thought about a better plan.
Example_CN: 我突然想到一个更好的计划。
MemoryTip: think 的过去式/名词：想法。

Example_EN: Thousands of people visited the park last weekend.
Example_CN: 上周末成千上万的人参观了公园。

Example_EN: The train leaves at three o'clock this afternoon.
Example_CN: 火车今天下午三点出发。

Example_EN: We walked through the park on our way home.
Example_CN: 我们回家途中穿过公园。

Example_EN: We have a science test on Thursday morning.
Example_CN: 我们周四上午有科学测验。

Example_EN: I bought a train ticket to London this morning.
Example_CN: 我今早买了一张去伦敦的火车票。

Example_EN: Please tidy your room before the guests arrive.
Example_CN: 客人到达前请整理好房间。

Collocation: wear a tie;tie your shoes;tie with
Example_EN: He wore a blue tie to the job interview.
Example_CN: 他面试时打了一条蓝领带。

Collocation: tiger at the zoo;tiger stripes;tiger cub
Example_EN: The children saw a tiger at the city zoo.
Example_CN: 孩子们在市动物园看见了一只老虎。
MemoryTip: tiger：有条纹的大型猫科动物。

Collocation: on time;have time;at the same time
Example_EN: Please try to arrive on time for the meeting.
Example_CN: 请尽量准时来开会。

Example_EN: I feel tired after a long day at school.
Example_CN: 在学校忙了一整天后我感到疲倦。

Example_EN: What is the title of your favourite book?
Example_CN: 你最喜欢的书书名是什么？

Example_EN: I usually walk to school with my friends.
Example_CN: 我通常和朋友步行去学校。
MemoryTip: to：朝向某地，或接动词原形。

Example_EN: We have a maths lesson later today at school.
Example_CN: 我们今天晚些时候在学校有数学课。

Collocation: big toe;from head to toe;toe of
Example_EN: He hurt his big toe while playing football.
Example_CN: 他踢足球时伤到了大脚趾。

Example_EN: We worked together on the science project.
Example_CN: 我们一起完成了科学项目。

Collocation: go to the toilet;public toilet;toilet paper
Example_EN: Where is the nearest public toilet, please?
Example_CN: 请问最近的公共厕所在哪里？

Example_EN: I made a salad with fresh tomato and cheese.
Example_CN: 我用新鲜番茄和奶酪做了沙拉。

Collocation: tomorrow morning;see you tomorrow;the day after tomorrow
Example_EN: We will finish the project tomorrow morning.
Example_CN: 我们明天早上会完成这个项目。

Example_EN: Shall we watch a film at home tonight?
Example_CN: 今晚我们在家看电影好吗？

Example_EN: This coffee is too hot to drink right now.
Example_CN: 这杯咖啡现在太烫，还不能喝。

Example_EN: The dentist looked at my tooth carefully yesterday.
Example_CN: 牙医昨天仔细看了我的那颗牙。

Collocation: on top of;at the top;top floor
Example_EN: Put the book on top of the other ones.
Example_CN: 把书放在其他书上面。

Example_EN: The topic of today's lesson is the weather.
Example_CN: 今天课的主题是天气。

Example_EN: The total cost of the trip was one hundred pounds.
Example_CN: 这次旅行总费用是一百英镑。

Example_EN: Please do not touch the paintings in the museum.
Example_CN: 请不要触摸博物馆里的画。

Collocation: guided tour;go on a tour;tour of
Example_EN: We went on a guided tour of the old castle.
Example_CN: 我们参加了古城堡的导游参观。

Example_EN: Many tourists visit this town every summer.
Example_CN: 每年夏天许多游客来这座小镇。

Collocation: bath towel;hand towel;dry with a towel
Example_EN: Please dry your hands with a clean towel.
Example_CN: 请用干净毛巾把手擦干。

Example_EN: We climbed the old clock tower on Saturday.
Example_CN: 我们周六爬上了那座古老钟楼。

Example_EN: They live in a small town near the river.
Example_CN: 他们住在河边一座小镇。
MemoryTip: town：比 village 大、比 city 小。

Example_EN: The little boy got a new toy car for Christmas.
Example_CN: 小男孩圣诞节得到一辆新玩具车。

Example_EN: There was heavy traffic on the main road today.
Example_CN: 今天主路上交通很拥堵。

Example_EN: We will travel to Edinburgh by train tomorrow.
Example_CN: 我们明天坐火车去爱丁堡。

Example_EN: The new teachers are still in training this month.
Example_CN: 新老师这个月仍在培训中。

Example_EN: I love to travel by train across the country.
Example_CN: 我喜欢坐火车在全国旅行。

Collocation: under a tree;fruit tree;climb a tree
Example_EN: We sat under a big tree and had a rest.
Example_CN: 我们坐在一棵大树下休息。

Example_EN: Our school trip to the museum is next Friday.
Example_CN: 我们去博物馆的学校旅行定在下周五。

Example_EN: If you have trouble with this question, ask me.
Example_CN: 如果这道题有困难，就来问我。

Example_EN: Her dream of becoming a doctor finally came true.
Example_CN: 她成为医生的梦想终于实现了。

Example_EN: You can trust him to keep your secret safe.
Example_CN: 你可以信任他会保守你的秘密。

Collocation: try to;try on;give it a try
Example_EN: Please try to finish your homework before dinner.
Example_CN: 请尽量在晚饭前做完作业。

Example_EN: He wore a white T-shirt and blue jeans today.
Example_CN: 他今天穿了白 T 恤和蓝牛仔裤。
MemoryTip: T-shirt：像字母 T 形状的短袖衫。

Example_EN: We have football practice on Tuesday afternoon.
Example_CN: 我们周二下午有足球训练。

Example_EN: Please turn left at the next traffic lights.
Example_CN: 请在下一个红绿灯左转。

Example_EN: How much TV do you watch every evening?
Example_CN: 你每天晚上看多少电视？

Example_EN: Lunch starts at twelve o'clock at our school.
Example_CN: 我们学校十二点开始午餐。

Example_EN: The bus comes every twenty minutes in the morning.
Example_CN: 早上公交车每二十分钟来一班。

Example_EN: I go swimming twice a week after school.
Example_CN: 我每周游两次泳，在放学后。

Example_EN: There are two apples left in the fruit bowl.
Example_CN: 水果碗里还剩两个苹果。

Example_EN: What type of music do you usually listen to?
Example_CN: 你通常听什么类型的音乐？

Example_EN: A typical school day starts at eight o'clock.
Example_CN: 典型的一天上学从八点开始。
MemoryTip: typical of：体现某事物的典型特征。

Example_EN: Do not abandon your friends when they need help.
Example_CN: 朋友需要帮助时，不要抛弃他们。

Example_EN: She has the ability to learn languages quickly.
Example_CN: 她有快速学习语言的能力。
MemoryTip: able → ability：能够做成事的本事。

Example_EN: Will you be able to finish this by Friday?
Example_CN: 你周五前能完成这个吗？

Collocation: in the absence of;absence from;long absence
Example_EN: His absence from class was noted by the teacher.
Example_CN: 老师注意到他缺课。

Example_EN: There was absolute silence in the exam room.
Example_CN: 考场里一片绝对的寂静。

Example_EN: You are absolutely right about this problem.
Example_CN: 关于这个问题你完全正确。

Example_EN: The new academic year starts in September.
Example_CN: 新学年九月开始。

Example_EN: Students have access to free wifi in the library.
Example_CN: 学生在图书馆可以使用免费无线网。

Example_EN: I deleted the file by accident this morning.
Example_CN: 我今早不小心删了文件。

Example_EN: We booked hotel accommodation near the station.
Example_CN: 我们在车站附近订了住宿。
MemoryTip: 英式常用 accommodation 表住宿。

Example_EN: Parents must accompany young children on the trip.
Example_CN: 父母必须陪同年幼孩子参加旅行。

Collocation: according to;according to plan;according to the news
Example_EN: According to the weather forecast, it will rain.
Example_CN: 根据天气预报，今晚会下雨。
MemoryTip: 固定用 according to + 名词。

Example_EN: Please open a bank account before you start work.
Example_CN: 开始工作前请先开银行账户。

Example_EN: Please give me accurate information about the train.
Example_CN: 请给我关于火车的准确信息。

Example_EN: They accuse him of breaking the classroom window.
Example_CN: 他们指控他打破了教室窗户。

Collocation: achieve a goal;achieve success;hard to achieve
Example_EN: She achieved her goal after months of hard work.
Example_CN: 经过数月努力，她达成了目标。

Example_EN: Passing the exam was a great achievement for him.
